faqs.question: What is the ranking of Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI)?
faqs.answer:
Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) is a group of colleges located in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. The group includes Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology, Galgotias Institute of Management and Technology, and Galgotias College of Pharmacy. Here are the rankings of Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) is as follows:
1- Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology is placed among the best in professional education in Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Technical University (Formerly U.P. Technical University).
2- In 2018, the National Institutional Ranking Framework placed Galgotias College of Engineering and Technology as the leading college in Greater Noida and third in Uttar Pradesh.
3- Galgotias University is ranked 10th across India in MHW Ranking 2021 by R World Institutional Ranking.
4- Galgotias University has been ranked among the top 151-200 universities in India, with a 147th ranking in the Engineering category, a 59th ranking for Pharmacy, and a 93rd ranking for Management in the esteemed NIRF INDIA RANKINGS 2021, declared by the Ministry of Education.
5- Galgotias University has received NAAC A+ accreditation in 2022 and scored 3.37 out of 4 NAAC score in the first cycle.

placements.overview:
Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) is a private institute, established in 2011 in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh. Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 15 courses at UG and PG levels in 7 specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Information Technology. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA in Full Time mode. Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 1,15,000 to 3,69,000. Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) has an annual seat intake of 1134 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) fee structure ranges between INR 1,15,000 to 3,69,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good in terms of education.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Students are doing internships from the 3rd year. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Flipkart, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, etc. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities. Labs and classrooms are good. The computer labs are equipped with air-conditioners. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is good. Our college has 2 girls' hostel and 2 boys' hostel. The food served in the canteen is average. We have a playground, a volleyball court, a basketball court, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: More than 80% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 50 LPA. The average salary package offered is 8 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Students should score a minimum of 80% marks for internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connectivity is available in hostel rooms. Labs are well-maintained. Classrooms are clean. The library is very good, and students can find books related to their course and others such as sports-related books, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good campus with good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: About 55% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 35 LPA, the lowest was 5 LPA and the average was 8.75 LPA. Focus edumatics, NTT data, ZS associates, Sendinblue, Nagarro, JK Technosoft, Byjus, HCL technologies etc. About 90% of students got internships from our course in companies like Wipro, TCS, DXC technology, Unthinkable solutions, Infosys etc. Top roles offered in our course like site engineer, structural engineer, nuclear engineer, consulting civil engineer, water engineer, estimator, design engineer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: I would say it was good not top but yes free access off Wi-Fi, Labs were well organised and clean. The classrooms were large and broad. The library was as usual silent and clean. There were so many books and the librarian was experienced and well mannered. The quality of food varies from the canteen to the canteen as some served delicious food at a reasonable price but others were not so much good in the hygiene of food. Medical facilities were up to the mark.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Definitely value for money but if you are expecting exceptional placement then it is not the place.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the best college for engineering course like B.Tech in terms of placement. You can even placed with a great packages but when it comes to other courses like MBA, it no where matches the level of any B school. There's every less chances of getting a good placement out here if you're an MBA student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food, mess, canteen everything is good. Less medical facilities available. One can take part in sports and game for this you should opt for the university campus. Since the campus one is way behind in terms of facilities provided than the university campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good with good faculty members and good atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Until now, about 30% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 5.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. A top recruiting company visited our college until now is Jaro. About 50% of the students from our course got an internship in reputed companies. Roles like marketing, finance and HR are offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities like washrooms, classrooms, labs, watercoolers and halls are in our department. Quality of facilities available in the hostel is good. Quality of food served in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical facilities are average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good placements and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements here are pretty good. Almost all the students in CS and IT branches get placed. The highest salary package offered is around 12-15 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is around 3 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 5 LPA. Top recruiters here are TCS, Wipro, Bharti Airtel, Infosys. In our course, i.e., B.Tech in IT, you will get to learn about programming and all that usual stuff, but the plus points here are that various workshops, seminars are organised for the complete development and learning of students. Getting internships is not a difficult task here as its NCR region, and you will get plenty of opportunities.

paragraphs: Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI) admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI)offers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,20,000 - 3,69,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 3 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

reviews.review_text: The library here is quite good. Labs are also well-equipped. The library and labs are Wi-Fi enabled. The hostel facility is also available. Rooms are decent, not very spacious, and you get 2, 3, 4 seater options. The mess food is average, not what you all will like.

reviews.review_heading: It is a quite good college for students who belong to the middle-class family.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is quite old because it is an old college. However, the environment is quite good, and the library is also good and has a good number of books. In the library, you get Wi-Fi facility and a separate room for online study. The hostel is good, but the food served in the hostel is not good and is not up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by the faculty,great placements in 2016, dissatisfied by the infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average since they focus on the Galgotias University more than Galgotias college but it includes all the necessary facilities. Some of the labs are well-equipped and has Wi-Fi. The classrooms and libraries need maintenance because they have become so old and short of many facilities. The Central Library has outdated books and most of them are useless for us. If you live in campus hostel you will have to pay nearly 1.5-2 times the worth for those facilities. T...

reviews.review_heading: To summarize, college 4.5 review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our computer Science course department is good. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library is good and the quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well maintained with latest equipments and canteen facility is also very good. Food quality is not up to the mark. Hostel facility is also available in which rooms are comfortably large in size and separate gaming area is also there for fun activity.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Galgotias Educational Institutions (GEI).
reviews.review_text: The college is beautiful. Food provided in the canteen is good and not expensive. There are 2 seminar halls and 2 grounds with a basketball court. Wi-Fi facility is available in each block. Classrooms are well furnished. There are well-equipped labs.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college needs maintenance. There were no cleaned washrooms and classrooms. It is not worth the fee paid. Everything is messed up. There are cobwebs in the classroom. There are no markers and dusters provided. Classrooms are very filthy. Desks are not meant to sit as all are broken.

reviews.review_heading: Galgotias Educational Institutions.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a really good infrastructure. There are separate buildings for each branches. There is a wall maintained sports ground. The Wi-Fi is omnipresent and the speed is also very high. Hostel rooms are very comfortable and students can get 1/2/3 occupancy rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Galgotias Educational Institutions is the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not that good, but all the necessary facilities are available. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a huge library. There are well-versed doctors on the campus. There are labs, sports equipment and all other facilities. many food stalls and a canteen are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an awesome college. I had the best time and also learnt a lot.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The campus has well-equipped labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, games and sports ground and equipment. Wi-Fi facility is not available for students on campus. Labs and classrooms are very good and have everything of good quality. We have a canteen, and the food provided is good. Hostel rooms are not good. But overall, it is worth the money and I have not faced any problem with the infrastructure except the Wi-Fi facility.

placements.overview: The GSFC University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/ BTech courses. During the GSFC University BE/ BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 7843 and 24633 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Fire and Environment, Health, Safety Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same stood at 38344. In this section, candidates can view the branch-wise cutoff 2024 for both the first and last rounds.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is well-maintained, though it is simplistic and less engaging due to a lack of vibrancy and modern aesthetics. Other amenities like Wi-Fi, computerized labs, non-air-conditioned but ventilated classrooms, a library, canteen, and gym are available in the university and are well-maintained. The hostel also has simple infrastructure. The hostel fee is Rs. 44,500, including facilities like washing machines per floor, joint bathrooms for all rooms, a mess providing meals four times a day, a basketball court, and an open sitting place. The hostel has flexible time limitations for girls 7 AM to 11 PM, and for boys 24/7, with average food quality.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for various courses at GSFC University?
overview_faqs.answer: GSFC University fee is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates are required to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is GSFC University courses and fee:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 4.6 lakhMBAINR 2.2 lakhMTechINR 2.2 lakhBScINR 1.8 - 2.2lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy of GSFC University?
overview_faqs.answer: Students seeking cancellation of admission are eligible for refund of academic fee. In case of any admission cancelled before the commencement of classes, students will be refunded fees after deducting INR 1000 towards administrative cost. Any admission cancelled after the commencement of classes shall not be entitled for refund of fees. Fees will be refunded in case the University has exercised the waiting list to fill the particular seat. The decision of themanagement of the GSFC University shall be final in all cases of fee refund.

review_summary.college_name: GSFC University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is good for fun and roaming.

content.Placements: For the 2025/26 B.Tech batch at GSFCU, placement rates are around 75-80%. The highest package is 8.5 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include GSFC, Reliance, and Atul. 100% get internships (mostly at GSFC Ltd). Roles offered are Process/Site Engineer. Note: The placement cell is very strict.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is very bad on the entire campus. The hostel is separate for boys' (Vikram Sarabhai) and girls' (Kasturba Gandhi) buildings. Rooms are typically triple-sharing with attached washrooms, furnished with beds, study tables, and cupboards. Mess/Canteen serves healthy, varied meals 4 times a day. Food quality is rated highly compared to other hostels. The canteen offers multi-cuisine options.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: This college has excellent infrastructure, superb laboratories, and well-maintained classes.

content.Placements: Approximately 60-70% of people have achieved good placements according to their grades and their capabilities. Around 80% of students got perfect jobs after graduation. The highest reported package is between 7 and 16 lakhs, approximately every year. Passing students have already achieved this previously and are also giving assurance to give their best in the future. Also, 80% of students achieve internships after each semester.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good from the student's point of view. Every requirement is fulfilled by them, and maintenance is performed on everything weekly. Wi-Fi and internet connection are out of the question; very precise. The library is very awesome, the classrooms are in excellent condition, etc. Hostel food quality is also maintained, and it is good to eat daily; hygiene is maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is an above-average college, but not that good.

content.Placements: The university provides moderate placement opportunities, with a placement rate of around 90% for CSE students. Companies like NetWeb Software, AIS, and more are mainly from Vadodara itself covering. The highest package is 10 LPA, while the lowest package stood at 3.5 LPA, with a hovering package of 5.5-6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is well-maintained, though it is simplistic and less engaging due to a lack of vibrancy and modern aesthetics. Other amenities like Wi-Fi, computerized labs, non-air-conditioned but ventilated classrooms, a library, canteen, and gym are available in the university and are well-maintained. The hostel also has simple infrastructure. The hostel fee is Rs. 44,500, including facilities like washing machines per floor, joint bathrooms for all rooms, a mess providing meals four times a day, a basketball court, and an open sitting place. The hostel has flexible time limitations for girls 7 AM to 11 PM, and for boys 24/7, with average food quality.

individual_reviews.title: They provided good placements in 2024.

content.Placements: GSFC University gives 100% placements for every batch. Mostly 3 or 3.5 LPA is an average package for this course. Pharmaceutical companies are hiring for quality control and other department. GSFC University gives the best opportunities to students for the best internship.

There are well-maintained classrooms, advanced labs, and two libraries one in the School of Science is a central large library and another one is the School of Technology which is a small library and sports complexes. individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Microbiology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, decent placements, and faculty concerns.

content.Placements: 80-90% of placements are provided. 99% of students got internships from my court in well-known industries and pharmaceutical Industries like Sunpharma, Zydus, and Alembic. In particular, my course laboratories, faculty members, and teaching assistants provide help to every student.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities, sports, games everything is amazing at GSFC campus. The facilities available at GSFC University are top which helps students to beat their confirmzone far from their home. The campus is very good.

admission_overview.college_name: GSFC University Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Dates & Selection

admission_overview.title: GSFC University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: GSFC University admission is a blend of merit and entrance depending on the course selected by the students. The university offers an extensive range of courses in various fields. These courses are offered via the various schools of the university; School of Technology, School of Science, and School of Management & Liberal Arts. Students need to provide either state or national-level entrance tests. Further, GSFC University also offers seats via the Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission procedure for the university.

eligibility_selection.title: GSFC University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: GSFC University course admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to pass Class 12 to apply for UG programmes. A graduation is the minimum requirement to apply for PG courses. For certain courses, students may need to provide valid entrance test scores, while merit is considered for some of the remaining courses. The university also conducts UMAT (University Management Aptitude Test) for admission to the MBA course. Find below the top GSFC University courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Course

paragraphs: GSFC University admission processstarts with registration, selection and admission confirmation. Students need to meet the eligibility to get a seat at the university. Students can submit the admission enquiry form online in case of any queries. Eligible candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat at GSFC University:
GSFC University Application Process
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university. Candidates need to pay an application fee as below to register for a course at the university.
Selection Rounds

GSFC University shortlists candidates based on national-level entrance exams such as GATE, JEE Main, etc. The university conducts theAdmission Competitive Test(ACT) for admission to some of the courses. Direct admission is also offered in some of the programmes to candidates who meet the specified criteria. Students looking to join through the state quota need to participate inACPC counsellingfor seat allotment.
Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the university. Candidates need to pay theGSFC University feeto confirm their seat at the university.

courses_data.description: GSFC University offers four-yearBTechprogramme divided into eight semesters. The programme is offered in four specialisations, namely Computer Science Engineering,Chemical Engineering, Mechanical, Fire and Environment, Health and Safety. Candidates need to pass HSC in Science stream with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC) in theory and practicals ofPhysicsandMathematics(with Chemistry or Computer or Vocational Subject) to apply for BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for BTech at GSFC University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to passJEEorGUJCETto get admission to BTech programme. The state quota seats of the BTech will be filled by Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC), Govt. of Gujarat. If seats are not filled under specified JEE & GUJCET, vacant seats will be transferred to either of the categories. Besides, aspirants must also complete Class 12 to take admission in BTech.

faqs.question: Who can apply for BTech course at GSFC University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed class 12 with Science stream with min 45% aggregate (40% in case of SC/ST/SEBC). Candidates must have Physics & Mathematics (with Chemistry or Computer or Vocational Subject) to apply for GSFC University BTech programme. Admission to GSFC BTech is based on JEE Main or GUJCET score.

faqs.question: What are the BTech programme offered at GSFC University?

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy of GSFC University?
faqs.answer: Students seeking cancellation of admission are eligible for refund of academic fee. In case of any admission cancelled before the commencement of classes, students will be refunded fees after deducting INR 1000 towards administrative cost. Any admission cancelled after the commencement of classes shall not be entitled for refund of fees. faqs.question: What are the popular programmes offered by GSFC University?
faqs.answer: GSFC University offers a wide range of courses. The university provides over 25+ courses via its various constituent institutes. To get admission into the university, students need to fulfil the basic eligibility and selection criteria set by GSFCU for the course of choice. Students can take a look at the following list to know about some of thepopular GSFC University courses:School of Technology: Offers BTech across three specialisations, along with M.Tech and PhD in CSESchool of Science: Provides BSc, MSc, and PhDSchool of Management & Liberal Arts: Offers BBA, MBA, BCom, and PhD courses

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for GSFC University?
faqs.answer: GSFC University varies course-wise. Candidates need to pass a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is eligibility for top GSFC University courses:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechHSC in Science stream with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC) in theory and practicals ofPhysicsandMathematics(with Chemistry or Computer or Vocational Subject)MBAGraduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ SEBC)MTechBTech/ BE (CSE) with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)BBAClass 12 with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ PD/ EWS/ OBC-NCL)Candidates with 45% above can get direct admission

faqs.question: How can I get admission in GSFC University?
faqs.answer: GSFC University admissions begin with registration. Below are the step-wise admission process:Application-The admission process starts with filling GSFC University application form. Interested candidates can visit the official website of GSFC University to apply for the course of their choice along with making the fee payment of INR 350 for BTech and INR 500 for BSc, MSc, BBA and BCA course.Selection Process-For BSc, MSc, BBA and BCA course candidates need to clear ACT and fulfilment of the latest eligibility, i.e., class 12. However, for BTech programme, student need to clear JEE (Main)/GUJCE.Admission Confirmation-After completion of the selection rounds, the shortlisted candidates are called for verification of the documents. Aspirants need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to GSFC University?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can get direct admission to various courses based on their eligibility. Direct admission is offered on first-come-first-serve basis. Below is the criteria to get direct admission:Candidates who have passed BE/ BTech/ BSc with at least 55% aggregate to get direct admission in MSc programme.Aspirants need to pass HSc with at least 50% aggregate to apply for BBA programme.Candidates who have completed HSC with at least 45% aggregate to apply for BSc course.

hostel_campus.college_name: GSFC University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Chemical Engineering: 68 seats  (38 state quota, 30 all India seats)

reviews.review_heading: It is good for fun and roaming.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is very bad on the entire campus. The hostel is separate for boys' (Vikram Sarabhai) and girls' (Kasturba Gandhi) buildings. Rooms are typically triple-sharing with attached washrooms, furnished with beds, study tables, and cupboards. Mess/Canteen serves healthy, varied meals 4 times a day. Food quality is rated highly compared to other hostels. The canteen offers multi-cuisine options.

reviews.review_heading: This college has excellent infrastructure, superb laboratories, and well-maintained classes.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good from the student's point of view. Every requirement is fulfilled by them, and maintenance is performed on everything weekly. Wi-Fi and internet connection are out of the question; very precise. The library is very awesome, the classrooms are in excellent condition, etc. Hostel food quality is also maintained, and it is good to eat daily; hygiene is maintained.

reviews.review_heading: It is an above-average college, but not that good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is well-maintained, though it is simplistic and less engaging due to a lack of vibrancy and modern aesthetics. Other amenities like Wi-Fi, computerized labs, non-air-conditioned but ventilated classrooms, a library, canteen, and gym are available in the university and are well-maintained. The hostel also has simple infrastructure. The hostel fee is Rs. 44,500, including facilities like washing machines per floor, joint bathrooms for all rooms, a mess providin...

reviews.review_heading: They provided good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Excellent infrastructure of the university. The college has a good library, they also have Wi-Fi. Labs are very good and the environment is also good. There are well-maintained classrooms, advanced labs, and two libraries one in the School of Science is a central large library and another one is the School of Technology which is a small library and sports complexes. There are also two gyms in the campus area. There are hostels, a canteen, and a medical healthcare center also present on the unive...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, decent placements, and faculty concerns.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, library, canteen, medical facilities, sports, games everything is amazing at GSFC campus. The facilities available at GSFC University are top which helps students to beat their confirmzone far from their home. The campus is very good.

reviews.review_heading: GSFC University - A center for academic and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs in the department of biosciences like molecular biology lab, microbiology lab, plant tissue culture lab, animal cell culture lab, and a general research lab. All the labs are equipped with state-of-the-art equipment which is calibrated regularly. The campus is equipped with high-speed Wi-Fi and students are taught in smart classrooms. Library consists of all kinds of books and it is upgraded every month with new books and journals and is accessible till 11:00 PM at night. Hos...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are really nice and all find it very friendly there.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice. The facilities provided there include Wi-Fi access. The labs are open 24X7 to work but you will need permission to work after the lab hours. They also have a library with AC where students. Faculty members can also read books in a calm environment without any disturbance. Classrooms are really good. About the hostel facilities, the food is really good both in the mess and canteen. There is also medical emergency center available for everyone. There is facility fo...

reviews.review_heading: A career in life science with GSFC can be exciting.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very clean and the food is nice and healthy as compared to the other hostels nearby. Labs are open 24X7 for students to work on anything (with permission only). All the staff members are very supportive and encouraging. They are always there to support. For medical there is a whole building named health centre. There are various clubs running in university related to our interests.

reviews.review_heading: Internships at the end of every semester: A great catalyst for placement.
reviews.review_text: There is a building allocated to labs called 'Anviksha,' which has a great number of labs for each specialized subject. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and classrooms are very good and spacious. There is also a library that is abundant with great material. As for hostels, there are 3 hostels: 1 for girls and 2 for boys. All of them are neat and clean, and the living environment is great. Food in the mess is also good; in our hostel, a committee of students is formed that decides the menu for ...

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of GSFC University.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi is provided, labs are well maintained, all the devices in the lab are up-to-date, there are lifts provided, AC is provided in the lab, and there is a sitting area in our college named Sarjan. I have not opted for hostel but it's good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college, good teaching, and good vibes.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good infrastructure and environment. Canteen food is very tasty and healthy, medical facilities are good as there is a medical center on campus and sports courts like basketball, swimming pool, volleyball court, cricket ground, etc. are absolutely good.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are above average. Canteen food and even the hostel food are bad, even when students are paying a lot of money for this. They have the audacity to underfeed the students. Even breakfast is only a piece of bread without butter. Sports and games are organized properly, though.

reviews.review_heading: GSFC university review .
reviews.review_text: GSFC University has full Wi-Fi access. There is a separate building that houses all the laboratories, including computer labs, chemical labs, and biotech labs. The hostel provides good quality meals, including breakfast in the morning, lunch, an evening snack, and dinner. The canteen offers a variety of food dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GSFC University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college provides us with all facilities. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel rooms are small. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. We have a gymnasium. A playground is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for events and fests.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Many books are available in the library. Computer labs are available. Our classrooms are well equipped. The canteen is good. The quality of the food is good. A variety of dishes are available. Our college has a basketball court and a volleyball court.

paragraphs: The application process of GSFC University for BTech programme is online. Aspirants seeking admissions in GSFC University required to pay a registration fee of INR 350 at the time of application in the official website.

GSFC University courses fee is regulated by FRC of Gujarat, who have alreadyconducted inspection and fixed the fees, which can be seen on ACPC web site. The fee structurefor other non- regulated programs is updated on university website regularly based on Board ofManagement approvals.

The university offers Merit cum means and need-based scholarships. Apart from this, the university also offers. GSFC University, National Scholarship Portal, Mukhyamantri Yuva Swavalamban Yojana, Digital Gujarat Portal (For ST/SC/SEBC), Hon. Chief Minister Scholarship and Bank Loan.

description: UIET Kurukshetra cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to the BTech program. The cutoffs are available in the form of ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates interested in taking admission at UIET Kurukshetra can check out the sections below to view the exam, course, and category-wise cutoff details. A few more updates are below:

UIET Kurukshetra cutoff 2025 was released via HSTES entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 127300 and 624632 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 127300, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 102078.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 127300.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

During the last round, UIET Kurukshetra B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 127300 and 624632 for students in the General AI quota. According to this cutoff list, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering proved to be the toughest to get a seat for, with the cutoff rank being 127300 in 2025, while in 2024, the same specialisation had the cutoff rank of 94388, and in 2023, it was 129449. reviews.review_heading: UIET, Kurukshetra College review of the year 2025.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is installed in the whole campus, and classrooms are good, but they have no AC. Labs are Air Conditioned. Hostel facilities are good, fee of hostel is Rs. 12,840 yearly, and Rs. 8,450 for BPL card holders yearly, and mess fee is around Rs. 3,000 per month. Mess food is average. All hostels have a separate mess, so the food in all messes varies, but the price remains the same.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty members, and decent infrastructure at UIET Kurukshetra.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of UIET Kurukshetra is modern and well-equipped. College has smart classrooms advanced labs a central library with digital resources, and high-speed Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities are decent, with clean rooms, 24X7 security, mess, water purifiers, and sports amenities.

reviews.review_heading: Practical exposure and lab work should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Kurukshetra University offers good infrastructure for academics and student life. Classrooms are clean and smart-enabled, with Wi-Fi across campus. Labs are mostly well-equipped, and the library is spacious with a wide range of resources. Hostels are decent with basic amenities and regular cleaning. Mess food is okay but repetitive, while the canteen offers better options. The campus has medical facilities and a health center with doctors. Sports facilities include a gym, swimming pool, and vari...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: As the institute is a government so facilities are average. The infrastructure or building is okay, in terms of looks. It provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, and good labs. The library is good according to the environment and infrastructure. The quality of hostels is good. There is also a reading room inside the hostel. It provides a gym for girls separately. Medical facilities are not very good. There is a sports complex also for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: As it is government and has fewer fees it is better than other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay, but it can be improved. In summer it's very difficult to study due to very hot weather. Wi-Fi is provided. Labs are good but there is a need for more machines. The canteen is there for students. The hostel is very far from college so it took a lot of time and energy.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure and facilities are good. Wi-Fi is excellent. Labs are amazing for every branch, especially computer science and engineering and electronics and communication engineering. Classrooms and library are also good. Hostel facilities are good. Good experience overall.

reviews.review_heading: Try for better colleges, but if you get admission here, then I would recommend the ECE branch.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms of quiet are more than sufficient for the perspective of a student, but they could improve it by providing air conditioning in classrooms. I am a hosteller and their quality of cleanliness and food available is good compared to other universities. They have provided sports complex and gym facilities too.

reviews.review_heading: College is good to join if you are not able to take the admission in IIT and NIT.
reviews.review_text: On the college campus, there is a complete facility of Wi-Fi for all the students of the institute with a prescribed ID and password for every individual. Labs are fully furnished with a good environment for our practical knowledge. Hostels are very well furnished, and the environment is also very nice in hotels.

reviews.review_heading: It has good faculty members, good placement and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Rooms of UIET are well-maintained and clean with good-condition benches. Each hostel has a mess providing regular meals, which generally cater to vegetarian and non-vegetarian preferences. Some students feel that the food quality can be improved, but it generally meets basic needs. UIET offers separate hostels for both boys and girls, that are situated on or near the campus. student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

faqs.answer: A:    The median salary granted to students upon a successful placement from the Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute is INR 2.76 LPA, indicating the institution's commitment to fostering prosperous career beginnings, with graduates receiving a commendable financial remuneration.
faqs.question: What is the median placement salary offered to the students of Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Accounting & Commerce, and have a fee structure of around INR 11,250 to 34,800. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Com and B.Arch. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech.

faqs.answer: A:    Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, B.Arch, M.E./M.Tech, B.Com, BBA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute are Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Footwear Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: This college is amazing for middle-class students because it has the lowest fee in all of India.

review_content.Placements: Footwear technology from Dayalbagh Educational Institute gave almost 100% placement because in Agra, there are many leather industries and good opportunities to start our own business. Students gave their best for placement and to maintain the college's reputation.
review_content.Infrastructure: Dayalbagh Educational Institute gives best lab, library, and classroom experience for all students. On college campus, there are four hostels, junior boys' and girls' hostel, and senior boys' and girls' hostel.
review_content.Faculty: As I know, Faculty of Engineering faculties are such amazing teacher, the best teacher has lots of knowledge. Course curriculum is too relevant to students and prepares them for good industry experience. College exams are difficult because they are conducted as open-book exams therefore, exams are tough. The department of Faculty of Engineering is too kind and moral.

review_summary.college_name: Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Completely satisfied with placements, good faculty members.

content.Placements: Almost all students get placed with an average package of 6 LPA, and the top recruitment companies are Honda, Tata, JSW Group, etc. The roles offered are GET, and you become an assistant manager in one year, so a decent managerial post is offered by companies, which is a white-collar job.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the course is well-maintained, and the basic necessary infrastructure is provided for the course. The canteen is not very good, having very little food variety, but the books in the library are provided for every semester at a very basic price. In addition, you can issue books from the library using your library card.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is the best for middle-class students because it is affordable all over Uttar Pradesh.

content.Placements: Something 70% students got placed. Some construction companies hire students for internships at construction companies. In my course, we have a chance to get selected at SSC JE, it's an amazing government opportunity, and we have good selection jobs at companies as engineers.
content.Infrastructure: In Dayalbagh Educational Institute, classrooms are amazing with smart boards, and labs are fully equipped, the library is digital, and all kinds of books are available. Hostels are above average and have good facilities for all students, and are most affordable for all students.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute.

content.Placements: Students were placed in my course at a rate of over 70%. The highest package offered in my program is approximately Rs. 9,00,000, while the lowest is Rs. 2,00,000. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Strong academics and placements, but hostel and infrastructure needs improvement.

content.Placements: Almost 80 to 90% of the students got placed with the highest package of 12 LPA, the lowest package of 3.6 LPA, and the average package is 5 to 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, Cummins, Chrysler, Hero Motors, and Volvo Ericscher. About 70 to 80% of the students got internships at Tata Motors, Maruti Suzuki, and others, and roles offered are design engineer, sales manager, project engineer, and research and development engineer.
content.Infrastructure: This institute has all the facilities, like Wi-Fi connectivity throughout the campus, and students can also access it. Libraries are designed in such a way that they have all the essential resources, including textbooks, reference material, and other things, and classrooms are also equipped with modern technology, and labs are well maintained with the latest tools for the experimenter and project engineer. Hostel and canteen facilities are also provided with hygiene. Medical facilities are also available, and sports and games activities are also there to refresh the students minds and show them new opportunities.

admission_process.title: Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Instituteoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Com, B.Arch and M.E./M.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 11,250 - 34,800. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years - 5 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: Best Faculty, Good Placements and Attractive Infrastructure and Facilities
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is vintage, as it's one of the oldest institutes of Agra. The seats and benches are too strong and old. The fans are very old, but their efficiency is still better than the fans we're using nowadays. They prefer a pollution-free environment, so you'll see a lot of trees on the campus. The Central Library is so beautiful, and its infrastructure is a sight to behold.

reviews.review_heading: Good government. College with low fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided are decent with a decent amount. I'm not a hosteller, but my friends informed me regarding the facilities. They are good as per the amount, and the mess food is also nice. The canteen has good space for boys, but for girls, they have a small canteen. The food is good. There are many opportunities provided regarding games, sports, etc., but you should be really attentive to grab them at first.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in terms of fees structure, events, study, knowledge, and training.
reviews.review_text: There is good infrastructure and all the modern facilities. The hostel's facilities are also good. Many other facilities, like playgrounds, practical labs, industrial training workshops, student welfare, dairy product and other assets for students, are provided, as is a college canteen that distributes food at a very low cost.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is best for its valuable teaching, discipline, affordability and placements.
reviews.review_text: Very advanced labs with all the necessary equipment and machines are available. There is a canteen, a separate sports room, and various cultural activities that also take place. There is also a also a central library with an excellent atmosphere. There is always staff present at the office to solve queries. Also, students can avail of scholarships at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dayalbagh Educational Institute.
reviews.review_text: The college has nice infrastructure all around; there is greenery and the campus is very beautiful. There is lightning at night all around. All types of facilities, like Wi-Fi libraries, are available for students, but the hostels are in very bad condition, as are the toilets. Food is also very hygienic and limited medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute.
reviews.review_text: The college boasts high-quality infrastructure, with 70–80% of students securing placements through internships and job placements. The central library of Dayalbagh Educational Institute, Agra, comprises nearly 1.75 LPA books and subscribes to about 180 periodicals and journals.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Faculty of Engineering, Dayalbagh Educational Institute.
reviews.review_text: The Digital hub of the library has e-resources like e-books, e-magazines, and 5000 e-journals. DEI Agra has an International Seminar Hall with a seating capacity of 250. 16 rooms are also available to provide living space for visitors or guests.

reviews.review_heading: The college has qualified faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was above average. All the facilities in this college were also good. The college has high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. overview_faqs.question: How good is PVG's College of Engineering and Technology for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: It has one of the most respected 2-year programs for MBA, mainly based on good faculty and curriculum. The college is AICTE-approved and is affiliated with Savitribai Phule Pune University. Even the cut-off in 2024 was as low as 41.74, thereby being open for many candidates. Average placement packages lie in the range of 6-7 LPA, but the college gives much importance to practical learning through industrial visits and internships. Experienced faculties coupled with a friendly environment help in polishing the students and making them more employable in sectors.

review_summary.college_name: PVG's College of Engineering and Technology and G.K. Pate (Wani) Institute of Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and supportive staff.

content.Placements: Course is well-taught and well-assisted. The college also assisted very well in placements and all the academics as well as non-academics. Many major companies such as TCS, Capgemini, and Infosys offered jobs on campus. The top roles offered are data analyst, junior software engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is well-maintained and the food quality as well as the facilities provided are of a good level. The rooms are properly cleaned, and hygiene is maintained. The library is pretty good with lots of useful material present in it. The college is supported with a Wi-Fi connection throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The best colleges for AI, Data Science, Electrical, and CS/IT branches.

content.Placements: I was passed out in 2018, and almost 85% of students got placed. Wipro, L&T, KPIT, TCS, Infosys, and Atlas Copco were among the top recruiters. Most of them got into the IT industry. However, some got placed in the core electronics and communication industry.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were newly designed with reference from IIT classrooms. There was a lot of exposure through VLAB and nice practical facilities as well. The entire college had Wi-Fi and lift facilities. There was an art circle where the PVG's team appeared every year in Firodiya Karandak and Purushottam Karandak.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty, average facilities, placement, and internships.

content.Placements: 50% of students got placed from my course. 32 LPA is the highest package, and 4 LPA is the lowest package. Torant and Wipro are top companies that offer jobs and internships. 70% got internships in various companies like Wipro, Torant, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers facilities such as labs, classrooms, a library, Wi-Fi, a mess, and a canteen, as well as sports and games. A digital classroom, Wi-Fi connection, and a suitable sitting area are available. Large ground for sports are available. Our college has facilities like gym and badminton court. Hostel and mess are average.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of PVG's COET after 3 years.

content.Placements: The college has tough competition for placements since few companies hire students so we have to stand above all students. Not all students appear for college placements but according to some information the average package is 5 LPA and the highest package is 16 LPA. Internships are provided by the college for some students whereas others have to apply for internships since it is compulsory according to SPPU.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are equipped with good facilities. Libraries are also good for studies but the space in the library is very less. Hostels are only for female students and the hostel rooms are very less so not all students get accommodation there. The college mess is sometimes open and sometimes closed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: PVG is a college you can opt for.

content.Placements: In my course, almost 95% of students are getting placed with an average CTC of 5-6 LPA. The lowest package is 4.4 LPA and the highest went up to 17 LPA. Top recruiting companies are KPIT, Godrej, Whirlpool, Dassault Systems, TCS, and so on. Internship coordination in my college is top-notch. Providing internships incorporates as well as defense institutes like ISRO, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides great library service, with books on every curriculum. Also, Classrooms have smart boards instead of blackboards, and Wi-Fi services are provided. Labs and computers in them are really well maintained, and the lab coordinators are also very helpful. Hostels provide clean rooms, high security with a safe time of 10 PM, and guards are constantly outside the hostel gate. The mess is yet to be developed, I won't lie. The food quality needs to be improved as per students, and I guess they will work on it.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to PVG's College of Engineering and Technology for B.Tech.?
faqs.answer: To get admission to PVG's College of Engineering and Technology in Pune, Maharashtra for a B.Tech program, you must meet the following requirements:Be an Indian nationalHave passed 10+2 with at least 45% aggregateAppear for the MHT-CET entrance exam if you are a Maharashtra state candidateAppear for the JEE Mains/MHT-CET exam if you are an All India candidate, or a migrant candidate from the Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir or the Union Territory of LadakhIf you have cleared JEE Mains, you will be given preference over those who have cleared MHT-CET.Admission to the B.Tech program is based on the candidate's performance in the entrance exam and subsequent counseling rounds.

hostel_campus.college_name: PVG's College of Engineering and Technology and G.K. Pate (Wani) Institute of Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is well-maintained and the food quality as well as the facilities provided are of a good level. The rooms are properly cleaned, and hygiene is maintained. The library is pretty good with lots of useful material present in it. The college is supported with a Wi-Fi connection throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best colleges for AI, Data Science, Electrical, and CS/IT branches.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were newly designed with reference from IIT classrooms. There was a lot of exposure through VLAB and nice practical facilities as well. The entire college had Wi-Fi and lift facilities. There was an art circle where the PVG's team appeared every year in Firodiya Karandak and Purushottam Karandak.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty, average facilities, placement, and internships.
reviews.review_text: The college offers facilities such as labs, classrooms, a library, Wi-Fi, a mess, and a canteen, as well as sports and games. A digital classroom, Wi-Fi connection, and a suitable sitting area are available. Large ground for sports are available. Our college has facilities like gym and badminton court. Hostel and mess are average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PVG's COET after 3 years.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are equipped with good facilities. Libraries are also good for studies but the space in the library is very less. Hostels are only for female students and the hostel rooms are very less so not all students get accommodation there. The college mess is sometimes open and sometimes closed.

reviews.review_heading: PVG is a college you can opt for.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides great library service, with books on every curriculum. Also, Classrooms have smart boards instead of blackboards, and Wi-Fi services are provided. Labs and computers in them are really well maintained, and the lab coordinators are also very helpful. Hostels provide clean rooms, high security with a safe time of 10 PM, and guards are constantly outside the hostel gate. The mess is yet to be developed, I won't lie. The food quality needs to be improved as per students, and I g...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure consists of only two buildings. The hostel is average. I recommend considering a room or a flat instead. If you're looking for an authentic hostel experience, you can still explore that option, but I believe a room or flat would be a better choice. The college has a library available for studying.

reviews.review_heading: PVGCOET is a decent college, not too good and not too bad.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very small and is also shared with a school. The infrastructure is decent and the classrooms are good. Benches are at the end of their lives. The cafeteria is closed half of the time so students have to go outside the campus to eat. Hostels are of decent size and 3-sharing rooms are available. Hostels are available for first-year students only.

reviews.review_heading: PVG COET is a college for students seeking the best in academics.
reviews.review_text: The course is directed by SPPU, but the teaching over here is the best. The faculty and the amenities are very good. And the hostel facility is also pretty decent. The campus is equipped with Wi-Fi, but you have to submit your IP address and all. It does have a library which has tons of books.

reviews.review_heading: PVG COET: An honest review.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is amazing and is very helpful to students. Wi-Fi is not available to nonhostelite. Labs and classrooms are nice and smart boards are used in classrooms instead of regular blackboards. Library is nice and contains all books we could ever need for our courses.

reviews.review_heading: This course offers unique learning with steady placements, less competition with recession impact.
reviews.review_text: Talking about our college campus, we have decent infrastructure with Wi-Fi provided in every computer lab. Even the classes have Wi-Fi, but as a new student, I have applied for it, and the college management is very slow in such works, so still, my Wi-Fi application is on the pending list. Talking about classrooms, our rooms are much better than other courses, as our department classes are near the principal's cabins, so the printing department is blessed with good labs and classes with ceiling ...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied due to supportive faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The faculty is excellent, neither egoistic nor very strict. They also support you in your projects or interview preparation. The infrastructure is quite good, though the hostel is not as great, the college itself is excellent. The library is one of the best, with a special building dedicated to it.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college, placement avg 3-4 LPA, good infrastructure, worst food quality.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus, but access is not granted to students. Only faculty have access to it. The hostel quality was below the bar, to be honest, and the rent was 4000 per month. Rooms were very small, and the environment was quite sad. In contrast, the girls' hostel is better than the boys', according to my friends. The limit for hostel students to return is 10 PM. The quality of food is, as usual, the worst; they provided good food only for the first month, then the quality worsened. Fo...

reviews.review_heading: Famous for core branches + printing old college with a brilliant record.
reviews.review_text: The college has a two-floor library where students can study. There is a gym with all equipment. There is one auditorium where all programs are arranged. When you apply for the hostel, you get light, fan, table, chair, and hot water facilities. Boys have fewer facilities compared to girls in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PVG's College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not extensive, with only three buildings for engineering. One building is shared between MBA and first-year engineering students. However, all the equipment required for engineering is available, including printing machines for the printing branch.

reviews.review_heading: Good senior support, small campus, disappointing mess food and decent faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with a vast majority of resources, like a strong Wi-Fi connection, fully equipped labs, well-furnished classrooms and a library with the latest editions of all kinds of books ranging from fundamental sciences to high-level engineering books. The hostel rooms are shared by 3 people each, and one bathroom is shared by two adjacent rooms. The food offered by the mess is decent. In the sports complex, there is a basketball court, a table tennis area, a badminton court, a mult...

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at VVITU are BTech and MBA. The university offers these programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. Further, the university offers these programmes for a duration of 4 and 2 years, respectively, with a comprehensive curriculum. VVITU Guntur courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students in order to prepare them for the industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University Andhra Pradesh in the table provided below:
Check out the below video to know more about courses offered by VIIT:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students get substantial industry exposure
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with the Engineering and Business Management streams. At the UG level, the college offers various programmes such as BTech and BBA.

At the PG level, the college offers MCA, MTech, and MBA programmes to students. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil, Mechanical, Business Analytics, FinTech, etc. Further, VVITU Nambur courses are AICTE-approved and are offered to students in full-time mode. The following table showcases a list of along with their eligibility criteria and total tuition fee:

faqs.answer: A:    Total VVIT University BTech fee is between INR 4 Lacs to INR 8 lakh depending on specialisation. Fee includes tuition, admission and other academic charges. Exact fee varies by branch.
faqs.question: What is the total fee for VVIT University BTech course?

faqs.answer: A:    VVIT University BTech admissions consider scores from VVITAT, JEE Main, or state-level engineering entrance exams such as EAPCET. Fulfil minimum eligibility criteria before selection. Final admission is based on merit.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: A bit dissatisfied because of the placements.

review_content.Placements: Only 10% of people in our course got placed. The highest package is 5 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Infosys and Cognizant. 10% of students got internships which are off-campus Mushroom Solutions, Vivenns Global Pvt Ltd, and FoxFire. Top roles offered are programmer analyst trainee and system engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is rarely available. Labs, classrooms, and library are okay. Hostel is nice, air-conditioned, and located on the campus for girls. Food is also tasty. No high medical facilities, quality is 4.5 out of 5. Sports and games are available like cricket, basketball, and also NSS, NCC.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Excellent faculty, strong placements, and vibrant campus life at VVIT.

review_content.Placements: Around 90 percent of students get placed each year. The highest package is 12 LPA, average 5 LPA, and the lowest 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Accenture, Wipro, and Amazon. About 70 percent got internships in IBM, TCS iON, and startups as developers and analysts.
review_content.Infrastructure: VVIT has excellent infrastructure with advanced computer labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and comfortable with 24/7 power and water. Mess food is hygienic and tasty. Medical care is available, and sports and cultural facilities are well maintained.

course_faqs.question: What is the highest scholarship available for VVIT University BTech students?
course_faqs.answer: Students scoring 95% or above in Class 12 or high entrance percentile can get up to 50% scholarship. After scholarship, the annual fee may reduce to around INR 1 lakh. Limited seats are available under this category.

course_faqs.question: Is scholarship renewable in VVIT University BTech?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, continuation of VVIT University BTech scholarship depends on maintaining 75% attendance and clearing all subjects without backlog. Good academic performance is mandatory each semester. Violations may lead to cancellation.

course_faqs.question: Does VVIT University offer scholarships for BTech?
course_faqs.answer: Yes, VVIT University BTech scholarships are merit-based and depend on Class 12 marks, VVITAT percentile, or JEE Main percentile. Students can receive significant fee concessions. Scholarships are offered regardless of admission route.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with placements and dissatisfied with faculty members.

content.Placements: 40% of students will be placed in companies. Above 20 LPA is the highest, and 4 LPA - 5 LPA is the lowest package in start-up based and some MNCs. 40-50% of students will get internships during pre-final year. Roles offered are java developer, prompt engineer, and data scientist. Almost recruiters are seeing coding skills in our side.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the building infrastructure is very good and disciplined to see. It has poor network, average classrooms, and excellent library. Quality of food is good. Sports and games preference are very low. Maintenance of canteen service is very perfect and obedient.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Compared to other colleges, it is somewhat better.

content.Placements: Approximately 65 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 44 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Flipkart, Amazon, Wipro, Dot Net, TCS, Mahindra, etc. Coming to internships, many students are doing internships.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are available for our course/department. A lab is provided only during exam time, and students carry their own laptops. Classrooms are good, and library is also good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, medical facilities, and sports are too nice.

admission_overview.title: Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University admissions are mainly offered on an entrance basis. The university offers UG and PG courses in full-time mode. These are offered under different streams, including Engineering and Management. Students can also enrol in PhD course at the university. Students have to meet the admission requirements to get a seat at the university. Students can either submit valid score secured in the accepted national-level exam or appear for the university-level entrance exam - VVIT University Admission Test. The Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University also known as VVIT University, accepts applications online. Read the following sections to know all about the eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University.

admission_process.title: Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: VVIT University admission processstarts with an eligibility check followed by selection rounds and admission confirmation. The college offers entrance-based admission to all the courses. Candidates are required to fulfil the admission process for admission. Check below theVasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University admission process:
Application Process 2026

Candidates searching for admission to Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University in any course are required to apply on the official site of VVIT University. The application has to be submitted with documents and application fees. Students can also apply offline.
Verification of Eligiblity & Selection Rounds 2026

Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University admission is entrance-based for all the courses. The college conduct and accepts university-level, national-level and state-level entrance exam scores for admission to its UG and PG courses. Additionally, candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria, i.e., pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to UG courses and pass a UG degree for admission to PG courses.
Entrance exam is followed by shortlisting for interview rounds and English Proficiency Test. The final merit list is made on the basis of performance in all stages of selections.
Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission

Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University releases the merit list based on the scores in qualifying entrance exams. Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round are required to submit a certain amount ofVasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University feeto lock their seats.
