hostel_campus.college_name: Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with placements and dissatisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the building infrastructure is very good and disciplined to see. It has poor network, average classrooms, and excellent library. Quality of food is good. Sports and games preference are very low. Maintenance of canteen service is very perfect and obedient.

reviews.review_heading: Compared to other colleges, it is somewhat better.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available for our course/department. A lab is provided only during exam time, and students carry their own laptops. Classrooms are good, and library is also good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, medical facilities, and sports are too nice.

reviews.review_heading: A bit dissatisfied because of the placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is rarely available. Labs, classrooms, and library are okay. Hostel is nice, air-conditioned, and located on the campus for girls. Food is also tasty. No high medical facilities, quality is 4.5 out of 5. Sports and games are available like cricket, basketball, and also NSS, NCC.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, strong placements, and vibrant campus life at VVIT.
reviews.review_text: VVIT has excellent infrastructure with advanced computer labs, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a well-stocked library. Hostels are clean and comfortable with 24/7 power and water. Mess food is hygienic and tasty. Medical care is available, and sports and cultural facilities are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very nice and very disciplined.
reviews.review_text: When it comes to facilities and infrastructure, the mechanical department is good. The department has a library and very big classrooms, and every floor has a Wi-Fi setup. The quality of food is very good, and we have emergency vehicles also. We have the best sports department as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for B.Tech students to build their careers.
reviews.review_text: It is located near the Kaza Toll Plaza. It is well-lit and properly ventilated, with 25 rooms, 10 beds, a bathroom attached, and ample study space. There is a dedicated mess that serves healthy and hygienic food. The fee is Rs 95,000 for the academic year 2024-25, including transport. There are 24-hour vigilant security services. Students have to opt for the bus service in the morning and evening from the hostel and the college as well.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice and has superb rooms. We have beautiful late nights on campus. We have the best classrooms and Wi-Fi is available. We have so many labs, and one library is there. The food is not bad and somewhat good. We have two canteens and a small medical clinic. We have sports for a day and an hour.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good environment and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: They have all the infrastructure for this course and also individual lab charges. The hostel facility is also good for both girls and boys. Coming to the food, it is very good. They serve good quality food. Coming to the sports, it is a good college for the sports person, they will encourage them.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, the college is good, the infrastructure is great, and the management is supportive.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and the environment is full of grass and trees around the college. There are 6 to 7 blocks in the college, and the quality of facilities in the hostel is good. The food in the mess is also great, and the canteen provides good food at good prices.

reviews.review_heading: Absolute discipline and education.
reviews.review_text: We have good Wi-Fi, excellent labs, average classrooms, and a good library. Air conditioning is available, along with quality food and snacks. Our canteen offers nice options, and we have well-maintained grounds and facilities. My college provides a variety of amenities and solid infrastructure, with well-designed rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are better but students require perfect training with great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure has been continuously developing in recent times because there is no control over the strength of students that's a quick problem to resolve or manage. Hostel facilities are too good with hygienic food and excellent taste. The price of hostel is much expensive when compared to other colleges, but worth it.

reviews.review_heading: A honest review by a truthful student.
reviews.review_text: Classes are quite large, but they don't have proper ventilation facilities for civil engineering students. Wi-Fi is not available, computers in library are not working, etc. As far as I know about the hostel, there are no good comfort facilities, and food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vasireddy Venkatadri Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in classrooms from the 3rd year. There are 2 hostels for girls and they are within the campus. Each room has 4 beds with attached washrooms and an air-conditioner. Each floor will have a geyser and washing area.

reviews.review_heading: This is the place to settle in our life successfully.
reviews.review_text:
In my college there are more advanced labs and most beautiful case rooms and peaceful library. My college faculty vis most experience and talented faculty are there. In hostel food are very tasty and healthy food is available and medical facilities are quickly supported there is ambulance are available in my college. There is a 10 acres of play ground is available 
.

reviews.review_heading: VVIT: Absolute discipline and education.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-most. All classrooms are air-conditioned. The food is very tasty and like home food. Infrastructure of college is good. Labs are also very well constructed and we have nearly 30 clubs from where we can gain skills.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Vasireddy Venkatadri International Technological University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Infosys, TCS, Wipro, DXC Technology, etc., visit our college for placements.
Our college offers good acedemic faculty for all the depts, And provides many oppurtunitues for CSE and ECE students.

All the labs and classrooms are well-maintained but in the hostel, they should improve the quality of food.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, placement opportunities, and teaching skills.

content.Placements: 60 percent of students are placed. The highest package is 31 LPA, the average is 30 LPA, and the lowest is 7 LPA-8 LPA offered in our college. admission_overview.college_name: CMR Engineering College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: CMR Engineering College admission 2025is a mix of merit and entrance-based. Students need to satisfy the admission criteria set by the college to get into the desired programme. Students can pursue undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes in the field of Engineering and Technology.CMR Engineering Collegeaccepts applications on the basis of a state-level entrance exam followed by counselling. However, direct admissions are also provided. The admission process mainly commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection, criteria, and other admission-related information for CMR Engineering College.

CMR Engineering College course admissionis made on the basis of clearance of the preset admission criteria. The college offers BTech, MTech, and PhD programmes in full-time and regular mode. Students looking to get into the college must ensure that they satisfy the eligibility before applying. Further, the college also reserves a certain amount of seat intake for the management quota. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for popularCMR Engineering College courses:
Graduation degree in Engineering/Technology OR AMIE/AMIETE or similar qualifications recognised by UPSC as equivalent to B.E./BTech

The admission process for CMR Engineering College includes multiple steps, such as application, shortlisting, and admission confirmation. As admissions are primarily entrance-based, students are required to clear the accepted exam and participate in the counselling process for seat allotment. Interested students can follow the steps explained below to completeCMR Engineering College admission procedure:
Step 1: Application Process

Students applying through the Convenor quota can visit the official website of the concerned entrance exam and fill out the application form. At the time of counselling, students need to provide the counselling code of the institute. Further, those looking to get into the college under management quota may reach out to the college for applications.
Step 2: Selection

The college offers 70% of the total seat intake for Convenor quota students. Such candidates have to clear the accepted entrance exam and participate in the counselling process for seat allotment. The remaining 30% of seats are offered through management quota. Students must have secured a valid score in TS EAMCET and GATE/ TSICET for BTech and MTech admissions respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

Once an admission offer is made, students need to report at the college and go through document verification. For final seat confirmation, students must payCMR Engineering College feesas prescribed by the college.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for CMR Engineering College?

Candidates can check this page to view the CMR Engineering College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025, along with other exam cutoffs across various rounds and categories. A few more updates are below:

CMR Engineering College TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 29505 and 38499 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations, use the provided fil

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 29505, 29552 and 31685, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to CMR Engineering College. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

hostel_campus.college_name: CMR Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, placement opportunities, and teaching skills.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is better compared to all the CMR campus. Our 4 campuses have the best infrastructure. About facilities, skills are average, and for every department we have full facilities. Food in the hostel and mess is better than that at other campuses of CMR, and sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: If you are someone who is looking for good and decent college, CMR Engineering College is for you.
reviews.review_text: Coming to infrastructure of CMR Engineering College, it is pretty good and we can see greenery everywhere. It has a peaceful environment. Every branch has a separate block, Wi-Fi is good, library has huge collection of books, and quality of food in mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities can be provided. Sports and games have very high potential.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has good infrastructure and faculty but lacks in providing in-campus placements.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are good. Except for the food in hostels, it’s good but not satisfactory. There is no Wi-Fi provided on campus except in the library. In labs, they give us LAN facility. Classrooms are clean and provide a good environment. Libraries are quiet, and we can take books home too for a certain period of time.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for students to get better placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in the college are very satisfactory, such as free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, AC labs, seminar halls, library, project labs, auditorium, bus transportation, ground, etc. The quality of the hostel is top-rated by the students, with a neat and hygienic environment. Food in the mess and canteen is also good with reasonable prices. The sports are played every weekend. Medical facilities are available 24X7 with an ambulance facility and qualified doctors.

reviews.review_heading: Great college to study, with great and supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: It provided great infrastructure for the college. It had great buildings, with a bunch of cool breeze and greenery. There were facilities of both the hostel AC and non AC. The hostel had the facility of Wi-Fi too. On every floor, there were like 2 Wi-Fi routers with good and decent speed. The classroom also had Wi-Fi connection. The mess was clean but the food had a little issue. The medical facilities were good, because on the campus there was a college of pharmacy too. The grounds were very bi...

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements from our year and good facilities also.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are awesome in the college, like a huge library, free Wi-Fi hotspots, auditorium, seminar halls, project labs, indoor complex, waiting hall, etc. There are two types of hostels, AC and non-AC, for the students. The food was delicious with reasonable prices in the canteen and mess, medical facilities available in the college medical room consisting of a professional doctor, and the physical activities like outdoor and indoor games are unlimited in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, well-maintained campus, and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-maintained infrastructure with spacious classrooms, fully equipped labs, Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostel facilities are good with sufficient and hygienic food in the mess, a clean environment, medical care, and provisions for sports and games, ensuring a comfortable stay for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with my college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Labs have 100% working computers. Faculty members help us with every step, and they have a lot of experience. The food in canteen meets the restaurant style and taste. We have weekly sports sessions, and they never stop using them to explore our limits. We have a medical room where we can take rest if we need.

reviews.review_heading: It is a student-friendly campus.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-advanced infrastructure with excellent in curriculum. Our labs have a good system (dell)with high-speed Wi-Fi, and well-designed classrooms with digital boards. Our library has very excellent infrastructure and has a wide range of books with most relevant ones. Food quality is very good in hostel and mess. Our canteen area is nice. Sports are the main point in our college. Faculty members always encourage us to participate in sports.

reviews.review_heading: We can learn and earn as CMR is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good labs and good systems. The Computer Science and Engineering department at CMR Engineering College was established in the year 2010 with a vision to help the IT boom and fulfill the need of dynamic software engineers globally. Since then, especially in the last five years of the IT revolution, the department has taken long strides and is now among that.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements for IT students.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department has well-equipped labs high speed WiFi smart classrooms, and a central library with e-resources. The hostel rooms are decent with 24/7 security WiFi and average facilities. Mess food is manageable with a rotating menu but is repetitive at times. The campus includes a healthcare unit a sports ground a basketball court and indoor games for recreation.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements from our course and facilities available.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is too big with many great facilities like auditorium, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, AC labs, seminar halls, project labs, good ventilated classrooms, etc. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls with different messes. The food in both kitchen and canteen is decent with reasonable fee. Medical facilities like ambulance facility and very well-experienced doctors at the college are available. Games like volleyball, cricket, ...

reviews.review_heading: Think placements think CMR.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure. In labs, there are only Dell monitors and CPUs. The chair is also of the best quality. The hostel is very hygienic and clean. Food is also good. Weekly twice chicken and daily evening snacks are served. Girls have separate hostels inside the campus. The library and classrooms are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I can suggest CMREC college for B.Tech students.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms and the college maintenance are very clean and beautiful. I can say that all the above-mentioned aspects are very beautiful in this college. The quality of the hostel food and canteen food is good. The hostels provide students with Wi-Fi and quality food with neat and clean rooms. The sports ground is very wide and large to play many games such as cricket, Kho-Kho, etc.

reviews.review_heading: If you think placement then think CMR.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is everywhere in our college. In computer labs, monitors are used only Dell company. Library is the best place to study for academic exams. It contains every semester and every course of our college is provided. The classrooms are spacious with good sunlight.

Our college provides excellent quality placements and a good number of placements, and it conducts various activities to develop students skills.

faqs.question: Can I join JD College of Engineering and Management after class 12?

review_content.General: There are grounds. The infrastructure at JD College of Engineering is well-maintained and student-friendly. There are spacious grounds for outdoor sports and various events. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and comfortable seating. Wi-Fi is available across the campus, which helps with research and online learning. Labs are well-equipped for practical, especially for engineering streams. Library has a good collection of reference books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper hygiene and 24X7 water and electricity. The mess provides food that is average in taste but hygienic.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good academics and average placements.

review_content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech Electrical Engineering batch of 2022. The placement scenario in our college is not very good, especially for core branches like Electrical. Only around 30 to 40% of students got placed in my course. The highest package offered was around 6 LPA, and the average package is somewhere between 3 to 3.5 LPA. Most of the companies that visited are from the IT sector, not core Electrical. Top roles offered are usually software developer, system engineer, or such support roles, but for Electrical students, there are very limited options.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Real talk and honest review.

review_content.Placements: My course is for 4 years, and each year contains a total of 2 semesters, making a sum of a total of 8 semesters, considering main exams and end-semester exams. Companies such as TCS and Tech Mahindra come for campus placement, but what matters is, do they offer jobs? This is the most asked question.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good from the outside but is not so well-maintained from the inside, making it like clickbait we can say. Mostly, you see the campus from outside, but you ain't gonna stay there. What matters is the classrooms, which are not well.

review_summary.college_name: JD College of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Nagpur.

content.Placements: Around 35% of students from our college were placed in Mechanical Engineering. The average package for students was 3 LPA. Mahindra & Mahindra, Tata Motors, TCS, and Tech Mahindra were the top recruiters. Roles offered included Technical Assistant, Supervisor, Service Engineer, and AutoCAD Designer.
content.Infrastructure: On our campus, there was a library and a music room. Students who were interested in dance were guided by dance teachers. There was a playground and a sports room. Wi-Fi was in the library for students. For students who lived in hostels, food was provided in the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College offers good infrastructure and faculty members, but placement support needs improvement.

content.Placements: It's a very good course and there are a lot of opportunities in the future. There will be a high demand for this course, and this has many more specialisations like data science and cyber security. The highest package is 12 LPA which increases every year.
content.Infrastructure: There are grounds. The infrastructure at JD College of Engineering is well-maintained and student-friendly. There are spacious grounds for outdoor sports and various events. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and comfortable seating. Wi-Fi is available across the campus, which helps with research and online learning. Labs are well-equipped for practical, especially for engineering streams. Library has a good collection of reference books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent, with proper hygiene and 24X7 water and electricity. The mess provides food that is average in taste but hygienic.

individual_reviews.title: I suggest students to be careful while taking admission.

content.Placements: No company is interested in coming to JD College to select freshers. Campus placements are very poor. Majorly sales jobs are given to students. Students are learning computer science, and the condition is horrible. The maximum package is 4 LPA. The placement percentage is very low.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in JD College and we have to rent a room 8 kilometers away from the college. Internet doesn't work on the college premises and we are not allowed to go to the library. We can only go when it is a library lecture (which is never). Classrooms are fine with projectors. In labs, computers take 10 minutes just to start, and all the computers are in poor condition.

admission_process.title: JD College of Engineering and Management Nagpur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JD College of Engineering and Managementadmission 2025is currently open for various courses. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BBA, MBA, etc., at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers doctorate and diploma courses. To get admitted to JDCE, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The university offers more than 10 courses (including specialisations) in various streams such as Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atJD College of Engineering and Managementis conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutJD College of Engineering and Managementcourse admission2025.

JD College of Engineering and Management admission 2025is entrance-based. The college also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, JEE Mains, CAT, MAT etc. for admission to specific courses such as BTech, MTech, and MBA. Check out the following table for details aroundJD College of Engineering and Management course admissions2025:
Particulars
JD College of Engineering and Management Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from various sources on the internet. Hence, is indicative.

JDCE courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularJD College of Engineering and Management courses:
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects (45% for Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates)

GATE,MHTCET MTech
Post Graduate
PhD Entrance Test

JD College of Engineering and Managementare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at JD College of Engineering and Management is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: JD College of Engineering and Management Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates can apply at the official website (https://jdcoem.nopaperforms.com/) for all courses including PhD programmes.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as GATE, CAT, XAT etc for admission to the MTech, and MBA among courses. However, the PhD course selection criteria is PhD Entrance Exam conducted by the university.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of the JD College of Engineering and Management cutoff, aspirants with scores equal to or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite scores of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theJD College of Engineering and Management feeto confirm their seats in the university.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

library.description: Well stocked library with a collection of 12,583 books
Well stocked library with a collection of 12,583 books

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: On our campus, there was a library and a music room. Students who were interested in dance were guided by dance teachers. There was a playground and a sports room. Wi-Fi was in the library for students. For students who lived in hostels, food was provided in the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: College offers good infrastructure and faculty members, but placement support needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: There are grounds. The infrastructure at JD College of Engineering is well-maintained and student-friendly. There are spacious grounds for outdoor sports and various events. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors and comfortable seating. Wi-Fi is available across the campus, which helps with research and online learning. Labs are well-equipped for practical, especially for engineering streams. Library has a good collection of reference books, journals, and digital resources. Hostel fa...

reviews.review_heading: Good academics and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The department has basic infrastructure. There are classrooms with projectors and laptops for machines and measurement, but the equipment is old and sometimes not functional. There is no hostel facility provided by the college, so most students take rooms on rent in nearby areas like Factor Village. It’s a rural area, so there are not many options, and the basic needs have to be managed by the students themselves. Sports facilities are okay; there is a ground for cricket and football and some in...

reviews.review_heading: Real talk and honest review.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good from the outside but is not so well-maintained from the inside, making it like clickbait we can say. Mostly, you see the campus from outside, but you ain't gonna stay there. What matters is the classrooms, which are not well.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students to be careful while taking admission.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in JD College and we have to rent a room 8 kilometers away from the college. Internet doesn't work on the college premises and we are not allowed to go to the library. We can only go when it is a library lecture (which is never). Classrooms are fine with projectors. In labs, computers take 10 minutes just to start, and all the computers are in poor condition.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements, but satisfied with good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is like a resort. Classrooms are also good and all the facilities are provided such as PC, projector, and speakers. Wi-Fi speed is also good. Labs and library are best and all equipments are there. Books are given there and we need to do experiments or read. In our college, there is no hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because of the supportive faculties, good opportunities, college campus, and good learning
reviews.review_text: There is no separate hostel facility for the hostelites. The computer labs and Wi-Fi labs are available with an adequate number of machines. The library is well-equipped with books. One canteen is in the college with good food available at an affordable rate.

reviews.review_heading: I love this college because it has amazing infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good-looking infrastructure, and it looks like a hotel. Labs and classrooms are highly desirable. For sports, there is a separate department. I made the best decision of my life by being admitted to this college. The canteen is clean. Medical facilities are available on time.

reviews.review_heading: Hands on learning while studying in JD college.
reviews.review_text:
The college has well-equipped infrastructure with Wi-Fi facilities, modern labs, ICT classrooms and a well-equipped library. The college has a good canteen with quality of food available, sports and games.
The college also has medical facilities .

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, teaching staff and environment to study.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is good. There is no noticeable pollution, making the environment ideal for studying. Also, the library is amazing. Computer labs and rooms are also quite good. The college campus is full of greenery, and there are extracurricular activities held like industry visits, sports, and many more to improve students experiences.

reviews.review_heading: Really Good Infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus has well designed buildings, equipped with state of the art classroom, laboratories and workshop. They are very functional with ample natural light and comfortable seating. Hostels are very well-equipped and fulfilled with all the basic necessities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure and studies of this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the colleges is very good, and the campus of the colleges is very green and clean. Cleanliness and sanitation are the main mottos of this college, which is the best thing I was attracted to. In the first place, the bathroom is very clean, and the cells are very safe from people who bully because of its anti-ragging measures.

reviews.review_heading: I love the college. It give all natural vibes and helped to develop me. And many more to come.
reviews.review_text: There are well-developed labs with all the facilities involved. And good water-cooler washrooms. Cleanliness is there, and there are canteens with good food and libraries available there with a lot of books you can use whenever you need any of the books. On Saturday for 2 hours, there are sports lectures where you can play indoor and outdoor games for girls; there are also medical facilities if needed; and there are common rooms for girls and boys both when you feel fake or something.

reviews.review_heading: This college is helping the students to make a bright furure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. There is no hostel facility in our college. But there is a canteen on the campus which is good. Wi-Fi has been available in the college so there are no internet problems. Labs are good, classrooms are huge and have projectors to explain the concept.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JD College of Engineering and Management.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure of the college is the best. There is full greenery, silence, and peace. The lab facility is good. They provide 2-3 labs for different subjects. Classrooms are cleaned daily. Ethernet connections are good. There is no hostel. But there is a facility for sports. Sport teachers encourage students to participate in sports.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about JD College of Engineering and Management

likes.text: The placements in j d college are good the companies comes in the campus for placements and where as many companies like tcs, infosys, teach mahaindra etc.
As our college is trying to give best of their best so that student can get best education and get hired by top multi national companies.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get into Netaji Subhas University with 70% as we can check the cutoff below: BCA - Eligibility is Class 12th with a minimum of 45% aggregate and english as a Mandatory SubjectMCA - Eligibility is BCA/ BIT/ BE/ BTech/ AMIE/ BSc (C.Sc)/ BSc (IT)/ Science graduate/ bachelor’s in any discipline with a minimum of 40% aggregate. Science graduates must have Mathematics as a Mandatory subject.BA - Eligibility is Class 12th with a minimum of 40% aggregate.MSc - Eligibility is Graduation in relevant discipline with a minimum of 40% aggregate.BBA - Eligibility is Class 12th with a minimum of 40% aggregate in best of four subjects.BSc - Eligibility is Class 12 with a minimum of 40% aggregate (45% for BSc Agriculture, BSc Nursing, and 35% for BSc Hotel Management)MBA - Eligibility is Graduation in any stream with a minimum of 50% aggregate. LLB - Eligibility is Graduation with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for SC/ ST and 42% for OBC category candidates)MA - Eligibility is Graduation with a minimum of 45% aggregate.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college with minimum fee in Jharkhand.

review_content.Placements: Actually, I took admission in the 2024 batch. The Bachelor of Technology course started in 2023 for regular entry. There is no batch that has passed out till now. The first batch will be passed out in 2027, but a lot of IT companies visited our university for BCA and MCA courses, like Infosys, EY, TCS, etc. The top roles offered are SDE roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, and Ethernet is also available in labs. All labs are well-equipped with modern technology. Actually, I am not a hosteller, so I cannot say anything about the hostel. The bus is free for transportation in Jamshedpur.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am okay with the course, but dissatisfied with the hostel and mess facility.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed, I don't know. The average package was 96 LPA-1 LPA in the 2022-2025 batch. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, McKinsey, and EY. There is internal bias during the internship because of the placement coordinator. The top roles offered are those of an associate.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is nice, but in some classes, the chairs are not in good condition. In the hostel, the food is really bad, with bad behaviour of staff members, as my friends saw a staff member washing his slippers with the brush from which our plates were cleaned. No on-campus emergency, if the situation gets worse, it will be disastrous as the college is far from the main city. Sports are okay, but there is not much space to play.

review_summary.college_name: Netaji Subhas University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: NSU is an average university for engineering students with low fees and average infrastructure.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students get placed in the 2024-25 placement session in courses like BCA, MCA, and Diploma in CSE. The highest package offered is around 8 LPA. Almost 90 percent of students get internships at my university. The top role offered is an SDE at the TCS company. More than 10 students got selected in the 2024-25 batch. TCS, Deloitte, and Wipro are major companies that visit my university for placements.
content.Infrastructure: I chose the B.Tech CSE course at NSU. For B.Tech CSE, modern labs are available. It has more than 400 desktops, which are well-functioning in the computer labs. 4 computer labs are available in our university. Wi-Fi is also available on campus. The hostel is well cleaned. The food quality is good. Medical, sports, and gym are also available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: In this college, good placement and rules are like school.

content.Placements: Approximately 85% of students in my batch were placed, with the highest package reaching 12 LPA and an average of 6 LPA from top recruiters like TCS and Infosys. Furthermore. About 70% of the course secured internships in companies like Wipro, primarily landing roles as Software Developers and Systems Engineers. The placement is also good. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Mahindra, Aerodynamic, and many more come.
content.Infrastructure: All things are good. All things would love so many students are full. All students work very hard.
content.Faculty: The education teachers are also very helpful. The campus provides a good environment.

The first batch will be passed out in 2027, but a lot of IT companies visited our university for BCA and MCA courses, like Infosys, EY, TCS, etc. The top roles offered are SDE roles.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available, and Ethernet is also available in labs. All labs are well-equipped with modern technology. Actually, I am not a hosteller, so I cannot say anything about the hostel. The bus is free for transportation in Jamshedpur.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am okay with the course, but dissatisfied with the hostel and mess facility.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed, I don't know. The average package was 96 LPA-1 LPA in the 2022-2025 batch. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, McKinsey, and EY. There is internal bias during the internship because of the placement coordinator. The top roles offered are those of an associate.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is nice, but in some classes, the chairs are not in good condition. In the hostel, the food is really bad, with bad behaviour of staff members, as my friends saw a staff member washing his slippers with the brush from which our plates were cleaned. No on-campus emergency, if the situation gets worse, it will be disastrous as the college is far from the main city. Sports are okay, but there is not much space to play.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: We have great infrastructure and placement.

content.Placements: Most of the students were placed in this course, and the average package offered was 1.8 LPA. All students get internships in the last two years so that they can improve their skills and secure their jobs. If anyone has any problems, the college guides them as well.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, for every course, they have great infrastructure and a separate building. They also provide Wi-Fi, labs, great classrooms, and a library for the students. They have a canteen so that if someone wants to eat anything, they can easily get it.

admission_overview.college_name: Netaji Subhas University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

paragraphs: Netaji Subhas University admission is open.The institute accepts admissions to its courses on both entrance and merit basis.NSU admission processis conducted in two modes:offline and online. For the online mode students can apply directly through official website. Whereas for the offline mode students have to first register online and then the admission form along with the required documents has to be presented at the respective college.Netaji Subhas Universityhas12 schoolsand a centre for Research that offersUG PG diploma and PhD programmes.The courses are offered in different areas of study such as Management Law Arts and Humanities Engineering etc. The University also offers a certificate course in Data Science.

Netaji Subhas University also known as NSU offers an extensive amount of courses across various streams and specialisations. The courses are offered in full-time mode. NSU admissions are currently ongoing. Interested students can refer to the table below to learn more aboutNetaji Subhas University admissionhighlights:

students seeking admission toNetaji Subhas University coursesare required to meet the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for their desired programme. MBA admission the university accepts valid scores in national-level management entrance exams to shortlist students for admission. The University also conducts its entrance test forNSU Jamshedpuradmission to PhD programmes. Interested students can check out the below table for eligibility and selection criteria of popular Netaji Subhas University courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Netaji Subhas University course feevaries depending on the specialisation and duration of the course. The complete fee structure includes components such as tuition fees caution deposits alumni fees etc. students can refer to the below table forNetaji Subhas University fees:

Netaji Subhas University seat intakefor courses varies depending on the specialisation and course selected by students. Students are offered seats basis merit in the last qualifying exam or through counselling of the respective entrance exam. Students can refer to the table to know aboutseat intakefor some of the courses:

Netaji Subhas University considers students performance in the qualifying exam along-with the score secured in the entrance tests. students seeking admission to any of the programmes must meet the eligibility criteria. Aspirants can check out the completeNSU admission processfrom below:
1: NSU Application Process

NSU application process is conducted in bothonline and offline modes. students willing to apply online are required to visit the official website of the university to fill out the application form and pay the application fee before the deadline.
2: Selection Process

NSU shortlists students to its courses based on the course-specific selection criteria. For a majority of courses the university accepts students on the basis of CUET scores. For the MBA programme the university considers valid score obtained in entrance tests such as CAT/ MAT XAT etc.NSU MBA selection processalso entails GDPI rounds.
3: Result Declaration and admission confirmation

Once the selection rounds are completed, NSU releases an online merit list with the names of selected students. The students who meet thecutoffshould appear for the document verification round and pay the course fee to get admission.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Netaji Subhas University?
faqs.answer: Netaji Subhas University offers different types of courses. The university has in total of 12 departments and also a center for research which offers a range of undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral, and Diploma courses in multiple specialisations like in Mass Communication, Law, Pharmacy, Engineering and Technology, IT, Music, Business, and Administration, Hospitality, and Training. Every course has a different fee and eligibility structure which you can get on the university's official website. There you can find many choices and can choose which you think is the best for you.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Netaji Subhas University?
faqs.answer: Netaji Subhas University is a private university which is recognised by UGC and located in Jamshedpur. The university offers several undergraduate, postgraduate, doctoral and Diploma courses. Admissions to all the courses are either merit-based or entrance-based. Netaji Subhas University does not accept direct admissions. However, students may reach out to the admission department of Netaji Subhas University for information about admissions through the management quota.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for Netaji Subhas University?
faqs.answer: Those looking to apply for the programmes offered atNetaji Subhas Universitymust fulfil the course-wise eligibility specified by the university. The university offers a wide range of courses spanning over various specialisations. Admissions to the undergraduate courses offered at NSU are done based on the score in Class 12 or equivalent exams. ForPG course admissions, Graduation in the relevant stream is the prerequiste for applying. It should be noted that admission to most of the NSU courses are done on an entrance basis, hence it is important that students secure a valid score in the relevant entrance exam as well. Aspirants seekingNSU admissioncan visit the official website of the university to know more about the programmes.

faqs.question: What are the important documents that need to be carried in Netaji Subhas University?

reviews.review_heading: NSU is an average university for engineering students with low fees and average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: I chose the B.Tech CSE course at NSU. For B.Tech CSE, modern labs are available. It has more than 400 desktops, which are well-functioning in the computer labs. 4 computer labs are available in our university. Wi-Fi is also available on campus. The hostel is well cleaned. The food quality is good. Medical, sports, and gym are also available.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, good placement and rules are like school.
reviews.review_text: All things are good. All things would love so many students are full. All students work very hard.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with minimum fee in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and Ethernet is also available in labs. All labs are well-equipped with modern technology. Actually, I am not a hosteller, so I cannot say anything about the hostel. The bus is free for transportation in Jamshedpur.

reviews.review_heading: I am okay with the course, but dissatisfied with the hostel and mess facility.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure is nice, but in some classes, the chairs are not in good condition. In the hostel, the food is really bad, with bad behaviour of staff members, as my friends saw a staff member washing his slippers with the brush from which our plates were cleaned. No on-campus emergency, if the situation gets worse, it will be disastrous as the college is far from the main city. Sports are okay, but there is not much space to play.

reviews.review_heading: We have great infrastructure and placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, for every course, they have great infrastructure and a separate building. They also provide Wi-Fi, labs, great classrooms, and a library for the students. They have a canteen so that if someone wants to eat anything, they can easily get it.

reviews.review_heading: We have a separate department for pharmacy called the Pharmacy Building Netaji.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, like labs, AC classrooms, and a library. It has good classroom management.

reviews.review_heading: University environment, teaching quality, Wi-Fi Facility overall good in less fee.
reviews.review_text: Classroom is clean, furnished, and AC is available. A library is also available. A modern computer lab is also there. In the hostel: medical facilities are available and the food is good. You can play cricket, volleyball, badminton, and a gym is also available. Wi-Fi is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: We have a separate department for pharmacy called pharmacy building Netaji.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, like labs, AC classrooms, and a library. It has good classroom management.

reviews.review_heading: A positive learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Good quality of food with good infrastructure equipment for the students to do practicals. Classes are given on an AC smart board, and the hostel is also ragging-free. This university is worth the money. It provides sports for the students, and it also has a lot of fests.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good if you are willing, you can take admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our department includes various labs, a research lab, a library, chemical rooms, a botanical garden, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Netaji Subhas University.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available, such as labs, AC classrooms, and a library. Teachers are very experienced, and they explain the lectures very clearly. They have patience, and they take their classes regularly. They have good communication skills and are supportive and caring.

reviews.review_heading: We have a separate department for pharmacy, which is called the pharmacy building, Netaji.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available, like labs, an AC classroom, and a library.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are great and placement is also good.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi across campus, and access to well-equipped labs. A smart board in class and a projector. And in the library, a vast collection of books. The facilities in the hostel are good. And the quality of food is hygienic, and the canteen is costly. Medical and emergency facilities are there.
.

reviews.review_heading: It's good college overall if you are looking for university in Jamshedpur with good academics
reviews.review_text: The canteen is not too good, but sports, mainly in football, got runner-up position last year in the IIT Kharagpur tournament. The basketball team is also very good, some of the big players from the city are on the team.

reviews.review_heading: They have a great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: They have a good infrastructure of the college and every department has a different building with the labs, library and great infrastructure classrooms. The quality of the hostel is also good, and they provide a good Wi-Fi connection for students, as well as good food.

Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology and Sciences provides a wide range of courses to students across streams and specializations. reviews_list.review_title: Don't take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: About 20% of students got placed. The highest package was 4 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA. Recruiting companies such as pharmaceuticals came last year. There was no internship provided by the college, you had to do it on your own. You should not expect the placement from this college at all.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure both were not very well maintained. Library was maintained with a lot of books. Classrooms did not have projectors, and the Wi-Fi was available for the staff only. The food in the mess was not that good, it's average. Medical facilities were there. College had it's own hospital where students get 5% to 10% discount. Sports and athletics were pretty good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'll not suggest that you take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario isn't very promising. Only around 20%-25% students got placed last year. The highest package offered was approximately 7 LPA, and the lowest was around 3.5 LPA. Most of the offers came from service-based companies, and internships weren't offered to everyone. There isn't much focus on practical knowledge, which affects how industry-ready students are. Core jobs are quite rare in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is decent. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors, and there's good Wi-Fi in academic blocks. Labs are there, but not always well-maintained. The library helps with studying, but it is a bit outdated in terms of resources. Hostels are fine, though not very spacious. Mess food is average, some days it's okay, some days not so much. There's a small medical room and basic sports facilities, nothing fancy but manageable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: You can take admission but don't expect much.

review_content.Placements: Last year, only a few students got placed. The placement scenario wasn't that great. Only around 20 percent of students were placed. The highest package offered was around 8 LPA, the lowest was 4 LPA but most students didn't even get placement opportunities. Only a few companies came for recruitment and most of them offered internships instead of full-time roles. The overall placement support also felt a bit lacking.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors and there's Wi-Fi across the campus, though the speed can be inconsistent. Labs are well-equipped and the library has a good collection of books. The hostel is okay. Rooms are a bit small but manageable. Mess food is average sometimes better on special days. There are sports facilities and a few indoor games. Medical facilities are available but could be improved. Overall, not bad but not the best either.

faqs.answer: No, direct admission is not available for most programs at Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology, and Sciences (SHUATS). The admission process for SHUATS is primarily based on the SHUATS Online Entrance Test (SOET) and merit-based online/offline counseling. For various diploma, undergraduate, and postgraduate programs, the admission is granted through Open Online Counseling.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good. No college life, no fest, nothing.

content.Placements: Approximately 35-40% placement in the corporate field. Many prefer to go for higher studies and government jobs. Many big companies come during placement like Amul, etc. Students got scholarships like UP scholarship, but this is only for UP people. There are various roles offered in this course like AFO, KVK scientist, etc. There are various roles on the marketing side, also.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructures are not that good. All buildings are very old, and the fee is a little bit high. Our classrooms are also not that good. Hostels are okay; I mean, it's average. The mess is not so good; sometimes it's good, and sometimes it's bad, like every other mess. No facilities like a good canteen, sports, and games. We don't have anything to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Radiodiagnosis and Imaging Techniques) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is average and not so good at anything.

content.Placements: Placements are average. Around 40-45 percent of students got placed from our batch. The highest package is 3 LPA, but most students got the average package. A few well-known companies visit the college, but not regularly. Internships are available, but mostly through self-effort. Roles offered are mainly technician or assistant level.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. Labs are well-maintained, and we have proper equipment for practicals. Classrooms are comfortable, and Wi-Fi worked fine. The library has enough books. Hostel rooms are clean. The food quality is decent, though sometimes repetitive. Sports area is small but useful.

paragraphs: Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology and Sciences (SHUATS) admission 2025 to a number of the UG and PG courses offered in the field of Pharmacy and Agriculture is offered on the basis of SOET conducted by the university. However, there are numerous undergraduate and postgraduate programmes for which the admission takes place via online counselling. The university also reserves seats for BSc, BSc (Hons), BTech, MTech, MSc and MBA students with valid scores inICAR AIEEAandICAR AIEEA PGscores. The admission process for SHUATS is currently open for a majority of courses. The application process 2022 via SOET & offline counselling is currently open and interested students can apply online on the official website. In addition to the regular programmes, the university also offers a number of UG and PG programmes viaDirectorate of Distance Education, SHUATS.
Check out more on SHUATS - Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology and Sciences in the below video:

faqs.question: How is life at Allana Institute of Management Sciences?
faqs.answer: The college's infrastructure is good, and they provide every facility. The college provides hostels for boys and girls separately. Admission to the hostel was based on a first-come, first-served basis, and preferences are given to the non-local students. The infrastructure of the hostel was good and well-facilitated with Wi-Fi, gym, etc.So the college life can be rated a good 4 (out of 5)The numerous fests and cultural events make the overall college life joyfull.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Balaji Institute of Modern Management (BIMM), Sri Balaji University?
faqs.answer: Hey nishar,BIMM Follows an eligibility category of an aspirant's 50% marks in their final graduation.As a BIMM Aspirant, it is vitally important for aspirants to have taken at least one competitive exam out of CAT/MAT/XAT/CMAT or MHCET. These examination results are valued for merit list of admissions.

faqs.question: Does SHUATS offer B.Sc seats via ICAR?
faqs.answer: SHUATS offers various courses in the field of Agriculture, such as BSc (Hons) Agriculture, BSc (Hons) Horticulture, and more. In each of these courses,twenty-five percent (25%)of thetotal seats are filled through allIndia entrance tests conducted by ICAR. Moreover, these seats are inclusive of Christian and general candidates.

paragraphs: Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology, and Sciences placement report for 2024 is not out as of now. However, the NIRF report 2024 has been released for the Pharmacy department. As per the report, the median package for BPharma and MPharma courses during the 2023 placements stood at INR 1.20 LPA and INR 1.87 LPA , respectively. Further, 1 BPharma and 2 MPharma students were placed during SHUATS placements 2023.

How are BTech placements at SHUATS?

faqs.question: How are the placements at SHUATS?
faqs.answer: The official placement report or brochure is yet to be released. However, the NIRF report 2024 is out, which incorporates the 2023 statistics. Out of 50 BPharma graduates 1 was placed in the 2023 drive. Further, 2 out of 6 MPharma students were placed. Check the key highlights of Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology, and Sciences placements 2023 for Pharmacy courses from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (BPharma) 50 Students placed (BPharma) 1 Median package (BPharma) INR 1.20 LPA Total students (MPharma) 6 Students placed (MPharma) 2 Median package (MPharma) INR 1.87 LPA NOTE: The aforementioned details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How are BTech placements at SHUATS?
faqs.answer: The 2023 or 2024 placement data is unavailable for Engineering courses. Earlier, out of 363 BTech students 85 were placed successfully during 2022 placements. Further, the median package stood at INR 3.75 LPA. Over the past three years (2020 to 2022), the number of BTech students placed has been fluctuating. On the other hand, the median package has improved from 2020 to 2022. The SHUATS BTech placement trends are illustrated below: Particulars BTech Placement Statistics (2020) BTech Placement Statistics (2021) BTech Placement Statistics (2022) Totals students 493 418 363 Students placed 95 38 85 Median package INR 3 LPA INR 3 LPA INR 3.75 LPA NOTE: The above details are gathered from the NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: What is JEE 2023 Counselling schedule at SHUATS?
faqs.answer: SHUATS (Sam Higginbottom University of Agriculture, Technology and Sciences) does not participate in JEE Main Counselling 2023 conducted by JoSAA (Joint Seat Allocation Authority). Therefore, there is no JEE 2023 Counselling schedule at SHUATS. However, SHUATS conducts its own counseling process for admission to its engineering courses. Candidates who have qualified for JEE Main 2023 and meet the eligibility criteria for SHUATS can apply for admission to the university through its counseling process. Candidates are advised to check the official website of the university for updates on the counseling process.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at SHUATS Allahabad?
faqs.answer: The placement stats of SHUATS Allahabad MBA is quite decent, more than 60% students got placed with the highest package of 40000 per month and the lowest salary of 15000 per month. The average package was around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies were BARE, Syngenta and VNR Seeds etc. The top roles offered were like HR, CEO.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during SHUATS placements?
faqs.answer: The average package offered in recent placements is not out yet. As per the NIRF report 2024, the median package offered to BPharma and MPharma students during 2023 placements stood at INR 1.20 LPA and INR 1.87 LPA, respectively. The following table represents the SHUATS placement package trends for the past three years: Courses Median Package (2021) Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) BPharma INR 3.20 LPA INR 2.50 LPA INR 1.20 LPA MPharma N/A INR 2.88 LPA INR 1.87 LPA NOTE: The above salary data is fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the total fees to pursue SHUATS BPharma programme?
faqs.answer: Students enrolled in the SHUATS BPharma course are required to pay various fee components that are a part of the total fees. Some of the prominent fee components are tuition fees, hostel fees, one-time fees, exam fees, etc. Tabulated below is the complete fee structure for the BPharma programme: Components Amount Tuition Fees INR 5.6 lakh Hostel Fees INR 1.08 lakh One-time Payment INR 10,000 Note: The above-mentioned fees is as per official sources. However, it is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc Agriculture at SHUATS
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for BSc Agriculture is INR 4.63 lakh. This is not inclusive of the following: INR 235 for insurance INR 5,000 which is a non-refundable registration charge INR 3,500 per semester exam fee (total 21,000) INR 3,500 for convocation, life membership of alumni asocial and alumni welcome dinner

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is SHUATS. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #87 under Pharmacy category. SHUATS excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around SHUATS rankings is covered in the following article:

rankings.highlight: 12th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Uttar Pradesh In 2025

nirf.description:
SHUATS has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Pharmacy' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, SHUATS fell 2 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

comparison.college: Guru Nanak Institute of Pharmaceutical Science and Technology
Y. B. Chavan College of Pharmacy

qs_world.description:
SHUATS has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for SHUATS indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend. In 2026, SHUATS fell 500 ranks to #1401 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been noticed that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2026, SHUATS fell 162 ranks to #454 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

hostel.description: The University has twelve hostels on campus, five for men and seven for women students including one Women's International PG Hostel. All the rooms are well furnished, ventilated and with WiFi Facilities. New International PG hostels for men accommodate foreign students.

data: Passed Class 12 with PCM/PCB/PCMB and a minimum of 50% in aggregate

library.description: The central library has more than 113947 volumes, consisting of textbooks, reference books, research and extension publications and many more publications including scientific journals and magazines, both Indian and foreign. In addition, the library has a large collection of e-resources and audio-video devices, etc. A separate periodical section is maintained in the library while the latest are provided in the periodical section of the library. A separate periodical section is maintained in the library while the latest issues of periodicals are displayed in the space provided in the main reading room.

hostel.description: The University has twelve hostels on campus, five for men and seven for women students including one Women's International PG Hostel. All the rooms are well furnished, ventilated and with WiFi Facilities. New International PG hostels for men accommodate foreign students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Hockey Ground

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Medical Lab, Environmental Engineering Lab

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. No college life, no fest, nothing.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures are not that good. All buildings are very old, and the fee is a little bit high. Our classrooms are also not that good. Hostels are okay; I mean, it's average. The mess is not so good; sometimes it's good, and sometimes it's bad, like every other mess. No facilities like a good canteen, sports, and games. We don't have anything to play.

reviews.review_heading: It is average and not so good at anything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Labs are well-maintained, and we have proper equipment for practicals. Classrooms are comfortable, and Wi-Fi worked fine. The library has enough books. Hostel rooms are clean. The food quality is decent, though sometimes repetitive. Sports area is small but useful.

reviews.review_heading: Don't take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure both were not very well maintained. Library was maintained with a lot of books. Classrooms did not have projectors, and the Wi-Fi was available for the staff only. The food in the mess was not that good, it's average. Medical facilities were there. College had it's own hospital where students get 5% to 10% discount. Sports and athletics were pretty good.

reviews.review_heading: I'll not suggest that you take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is decent. Classrooms are clean and equipped with projectors, and there's good Wi-Fi in academic blocks. Labs are there, but not always well-maintained. The library helps with studying, but it is a bit outdated in terms of resources. Hostels are fine, though not very spacious. Mess food is average, some days it's okay, some days not so much. There's a small medical room and basic sports facilities, nothing fancy but manageable.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission but don't expect much.
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors and there's Wi-Fi across the campus, though the speed can be inconsistent. Labs are well-equipped and the library has a good collection of books. The hostel is okay. Rooms are a bit small but manageable. Mess food is average sometimes better on special days. There are sports facilities and a few indoor games. Medical facilities are available but could be improved. Overall, not bad but not the best either.

reviews.review_heading: Average with studies. Placement is not present in all courses. Infrastructure is worth seeing.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is kind of good but it gives you restrictions. You are allowed to enter the hostel premises till 7:00 PM in summer, and 6:00 PM in winter. Food is the same as all hostels are average. You need to look after yourself in the hostel. But if you get a nice circle, the college life will turn out nice.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied due to poor management.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. There is a large campus. We have library, digital library, hostel, and all other things. There are 3 hostels, new hostel, old hostel, and international hostel. There are 4 messes and 4 canteens where the food quality is satisfactory and delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with what we have heard about the university and what's here.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. We have clean drinking water. Departments have auditoriums, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. We have a big library with AC and Wi-Fi. In hostel, we have cool drinking water and Wi-Fi. Food is below average. We have 3 mess available.

reviews.review_heading: I will not recommend to take admission to this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure both are quite satisfactory. Library is well maintained with a lot of books. Classrooms do not have smart projectors and Wi-Fi is available for the staff only. I don't know much about the hostel but as my friends told me the food in mess is not that good, it's average. Medical facilities are there. College has its own hospital where students get 5% discount. Sports and athletics are quite good.

reviews.review_heading: One can take admission, overall good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities services are good enough. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. Labs and libraries are always neat and clean. I don't know much about the hostel as I'm living in PG. Medical facilities, sports and games are all pretty good. The quality of food is decent and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good because of good faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The location, lab facilities, and infrastructure are very good and very well-designed. The hostel is also good with all facilities. The mess food is also good. A canteen is available. Facilities are good. They conduct sports and games all over courses.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.Sc. (Hons.) in Horticulture course at SHUATS.
reviews.review_text: The college hostels are provided at first during the admission process. There are separate hostels for both girls and boys. In the girl's hostel, there is an old building. In the new building, the college has good hostel facilities, mess, canteen, etc. The quality of the food is not that good but it's okay. There is a contractor for the food. The canteen and a small cafe are available in the college. Wi-Fi is provided by the college, and we have to just provide a fee for it.

reviews.review_heading: It has a good campus life and a well-equipped library.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-equipped with all the amenities. The infrastructure is also good and well-maintained. The department has its own library with journals, books, and research papers. The department has Wi-Fi facilities. There are labs for conducting the practicals, and it has all the required equipment. The university has 7 girls hostels and 5 boys hostels. Every hostel has over more than 50 rooms. The hostel mess provides three meals and evening snacks.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very famous, basically for agriculture, and  has been working for the last 130 years.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are very good and our infrastructure is from the Britishers' time. They provide us free Wi-Fi in every classroom, department, hostel, and in libraries as well. The quality of food is good, and medical facilities are available with a hospital in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely Dissatisfied and Disappointed.
reviews.review_text: They have a lot of land but are not providing facilities. Our department is comparatively better than others, but still, it's only satisfactory when you compare it with other departments. They just cut the connection for AC even in summer, and in most cases, there are even classes where you won't get an AC. The condition of the toilets is bad, and the water tanks also seem unhygienic. There are a lot of benches that are broken, and cleaning is also not proper. They have a Wi-Fi connection, but s...

individual_reviews.title: My college focuses on academics but does not focus on activities like events and sports.

content.Placements: In Dronacharya College of Engineering, 60-70 percent of students got placements in highly reputed companies. The average package ranges from 4-5 LPA. The highest package is 19 LPA, and the lowest package is 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, and Infosys. The internship rate is 40-50 percent, and students get internships in the 2nd to 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

The university offers UG, PG, and diploma programmes. These courses are offered in the fields of Engineering, Pharmacy and healthcare, Humanities, Management, Science, Arts, etc. Further, the university also offers PhD courses in Pharmacy, Law, Management, Psychology, etc. The admission process for Gurugram University commences online. Students have to go through the HSTES counselling for seat allotment to most of the courses. The university accepts vali scores in exams, such as JEE Mains, CUET, and more. Interested students can go through the following sections to learn about the admission process and eligibility for Gurugram University.

paragraphs: Gurgugram University admission processstarts with an eligibility check. Eligible students can then apply online and go through the selection process and admission confirmation. The university accepts students through entrance/ merit + counselling basis. Eligible students can follow the steps below to complete the admission atGurgugram University:
Application Process 2025

Interested students can go to theGurugram University Samarth portaland fill the application form with all the required details. A non-refundable amount of INR 1000 for the General Category and INR 250 for the Scheduled Caste is to be paid when finally submitting the form.
Selection Process 2026

After submitting the application form candidates will be summoned for the department-wise entrance exams. The applicants are scrutinised based on their performance in the entrance exam/ past academic performance. The university shortlists students based on either academic merit or entrance performance. Seats are offered through the HSTES counselling.
Admission Confirmation
Selected students have to report for verification of documents and pay theGurugram University admission feesto complete the admission process.

TheGurugram University fee structureincludes components, such as tuition fees, library fees, lab fees, exam fees, and more. Students have to pay some of these components only once at the time of admission. The rest are to be paid either annually or semester-wise as per the guidelines. Students can pay the fees through Credit Card/ Debit Card/ UPI/ Net Banking, etc. See below the table to know about theGurugram University feesfor some of the popular programmes:
Note: This information is taken from official sources and can change.
