The minimum age of the candidate at the time of application must be 17 years on or before Dec 31 of the year of admission to the programme. Students can check out the highlights below to learn about theGurugram University BPharma course

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharma course at Gurugram University?
faqs.answer: Gurugram University offers BPharma at the undergraduate level in full-time mode. Students can also pursue a three year BPharma course through lateral entry. Aspirants must fulfil the admission criteria to be eligible for the programme. Students will be selected through HSTES. faqs.question: Does Gurugram University offer lateral admissions for BPharma?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gurugram University does offer lateral admissions for BPharma to students. It is a three-year programme offered at the undergraduate level through the Department of Pharmacy of the university. Admission to the programme is done throughLateral Entry Entrance Test(LEET) andHSTES. Students fulfiling the eligibility criteria of the programme can visit the official website of the university to know further.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dronacharya College of EngineeringReviewed on 14 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college focuses on academics but does not focus on activities like events and sports.
reviews.review_text: In my college, a hostel is available but temporarily, and it is not in use for some reason. My college provides Wi-Fi facility for all students with a smart board in all classrooms. My college has a library with lots of books. There are 2 canteens. Labs are provided with all equipment. For medical facilities, 1 medical room is available. There is a large campus for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Gurugram University review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facility, modern classrooms, and a library were also available. The quality of the hostel was also good. Mess and canteen food was also good in taste. Sports and games complex was available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the Gurugram University is very good. There are two campuses. One campus is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the other campus is located in Sector 87, Gurugram. The labs are very well maintained. And the library is well stocked.

reviews.review_heading: The college is above average but not very good.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure, it is under construction right now. The college has 2 campuses, one in Sector 51, Gurugram and the other in Sector 87, Manesar. There is no hostel right now, but in the next few years, they will provide a hostel and many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The university is above average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is just wow in the next 4-5 years because there are two campuses. The old campus is in Sector 51 Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87. The BPT course is in the new campus. The new campus is under construction, and the hostel is also under construction.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, and there are two campuses of Gurugram University, one campus is in Sector 51, Gurugram and the second campus is in Sector 87, Manesar. The new campus is under construction. The physiotherapy department is in the new campus. The library is well-maintained. Labs are very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Government College Sector-9, GurgaonReviewed on 19 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Budget-friendly with good teachers and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: For being a government college, here the infrastructure is good and provided courses are nice. There are so many courses available so you don't have to feel sorry for what you want to learn. In our college, we have canteen and library. We have Wi-Fi support in every corner of the college so it is a good thing. The library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in Gurugram University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Gurugram University is above average. There is a separate building for the department of physiotherapy, which is under construction. Once the construction is complete, the department will shift to that building. The library is excellent and well-stocked.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in this.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is under construction. The new buildings are very excellent. There are two campuses here in Gurugram. The old campus is located in Sector 51 in Gurugram. The new campuses are located in Sector 87 in Gurugram (near Kankrola village).

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is under construction, but I can say that once the construction is complete, its is the best university offering Bachelor of physiotherapy in Haryana. The building is extremely good with full AC. The labs are very good. All things are good, and the old is also good.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admissions, and you can study well to achieve your success.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Gurugram University Sector 87 is under construction. There are no proper classes, and hostel facilities are not available. There is no proper facility for the students to live in the PG. There is no library. Campus is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: You can take admission in it, but there are some good choices.
reviews.review_text: Gurugram University has two campuses. One campus is new, which is located in Sector 51, Gurugram, and the new campus is in Sector 87, which is under construction. Some of the courses are in the new campus, and some are in the old campus. Once a new campus is complete, all courses will come to the new campus.

The library is also very small and does not have relevant books, and the librarian is also not available in the library to issue books.

paragraphs: The fee for MBA in Gurugram University is around INR 66,00- INR 1.8 lakh. Other than the tuition fee, students have to pay other one-time charges like University Development, lab fee, field work, etc. . However, this fee is sourced from unofficial sources. Hence, is indicative. In order to check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details.

Yes, there are scholarships for the Scheduled Caste Category students at Gurugram University. The university offers Post Matric Scholarship Scheme of GOI for welfare of candidates belonging to the Scheduled Caste Category. As per letter No.3/44-2012 Sch. (2) dated 18.06.2013 of the Director General Higher Education, Haryana, Panchkula, students, whose parents/guardian income is upto INR 2.50 Lacs per annum, are eligible for the scholarship.

The scholarshisp offers students include enrollment/registration, tuition, games, union, library, magazine, Medical Examination and such other fees compulsorily payable by the student to the institution or University/Board. Refundable deposit like caution money, security deposit are, however, excluded. For students admitted under this scheme, the application form has to be submitted by the students to the concerned Chairperson/Director of the Department/ Institute.

Gurugram University extends a range of scholarships that include fee waivers and concessions for meritorious and needy students. Scholarships at Gurugram University are on the university page and can be downloaded and printed as an application form which lists the types of scholarships and their requirements.

The BCom fee at Gurugram University ranges from INR 1.44 Lacs to INR 1.8 Lakh. The BCom fee includes one-time charges like University Development, lab fees, fieldwork, etc. Final admission to the BTech cousre is confirmed once the admission fee is paid within the stipulated period. To check out the latest and exact fee break-up students are advised to visit the official website or reach out to the admission office for details. *This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

college_info.intro:
Mohan Babu University provides MBA, MTech, and BTech as popular programmes at the UG and PG levels. The specialisations include Certified Investment Banking Operations Professional, Business Analytics, Computer Science and Engineering, CSE (AI & ML), Data Science, Cyber Security, Electronics and Communication Engineering, etc.
In addition to that, courses in commerce, computer applications, and pharmacy are also available at Mohan Babu University Andhra Pradesh. The eligibility criteria for MTech involve a 50% marks in Graduation, similarly, a course such as MBA is offered for 2 years with eligibility criteria of 50% marks in Graduation. Besides these two, BTech is offered for 4 years with the eligibility criteria of 45% aggregate in Class 12 with qualification exam scores of JEE Main, MBUCET, or AP EAMCET.
For admission to all the courses, candidates should ensure the fulfilment of the eligibility criteria. Below are the details regarding MBU popular programmes:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mohan Babu University Tirupati courses are offered across different fields of education, which include Engineering, Management, Science, Computer Applications, Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, and Commerce, at the UG and PG levels. Courses such as BSc and MSc offer specialisation in Agriculture and Forensic Sciences, whereas, courses such as BTech offers specialisations such as CSE- AI & ML, ECE, Cyber Security, Electronics and Instrumentation and many more. The courses offered by the university range between 2-4 years.

faqs.answer: A:    Applicants must have a minimum of 55% marks in their bachelor's degree to be eligible for admission to the MBA programme of MBU. The admission is merit-based and based on national-level entrance tests. Applicants having a valid CAT score are considered for direct admission.
faqs.question: What are the eligibility criteria for the MBA programme at Mohan Babu University?

faqs.answer: A:    The general eligibilty criteria for MBU UG courses is that the candidates must have passed class 12 with a minimum 55% marks, in any discipline, from a recognised board. Candidates seeking admission to BTech courses must have studied Maths, Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects in class 12 and scored a minimum of 60% marks. For candidates seeking admission to MBU PG courses, the general eligibility is the candidates must have passed graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate from a recognised university.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBU?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Mohan Babu Univeristy accepts Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scrores to shorlist candidates for admission to MBU BTech. Interested candidates can apply for the entrance exam through the official website of AP EAMCET. Candidates seeking admission can refer to the table given below to check out the latest year cutoff trends for the General All India category students:Course2023B.Tech. in Electronics and Communications Engineering8932B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering19615B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering9350B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science)14993B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security)12401B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning)11221
faqs.question: Does Mohan Babu University accept EAMCET?

faqs.answer: A:    Mohan Babu University determines its admission requirements based on the results of the Andhra Pradesh EAMCET exam. To take admission into various courses in engineering, medicine, and agriculture at MBU, candidates must meet the Mohan Babu University cut off 2023.The overall cutoff for AP-EAPCET is 14735 - 133931 rank.

review_summary.college_name: Mohan Babu University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, strict rules. More feels worst food, no enjoyment.

content.Placements: Top package offered is 33 LPA and lowest is 1.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys and Wipro and a minimum of 160 are taken under internship to Kia. Roles offered by them are electrical engineer for cars, EV cars, and most members get internship.
content.Infrastructure: Forest food, good rooms, good infrastructure and the facilities are available in the subject Analog Electronics in the place of IPS. We are in a meeting with the team and we will be upgraded to Platinum Debit Cars and this is the first option for you.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructures is very good.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed in my course is around 75 percent. Companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, etc. Roles are both software and hardware engineering. The highest is 60 LPA, the lowest is 3-4 LPA, and average is 5-6 LPA. Percentage of students who got internships is about 50 percent.
content.Infrastructure: Libraries are pretty good in our university. The hostel facilities are average and comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available in campus if a student falls sick. The sports and game facilities are nice, and students can play different games to stay healthy and enjoy their free time. They also take us to tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dream, believe, and achieve.

content.Placements: Percentage of students placed in my course is about 75 percent. Top companies are TCS, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, etc. The percentage of students who got internships from my course is around 38 percent, and the companies are Cognizant, Wipro. Top roles offered in my course are related to both software and hardware fields.
content.Infrastructure: We have very good infrastructure in our college. Library is the best part of our college. They provide Wi-Fi too. Faculty in Mohan Babu University are above average. They have good content and more information about subjects. Hostels are not that good but we can stay. The food they provide is average. In Mohan Babu University, they conduct many games and also take us to other tournaments.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Offers good infrastructure, average faculty, and improving placement opportunities.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students were placed in my course. The highest package secured is 60 LPA at Google. Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, Google, and Deloitte are some of the top recruiting companies. 50 percent of the students got internships from companies like Google, Infosys, and Wipro.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. We have been provided with a very vast and extraordinary library. The college also has a very big playground. They conduct sports days and encourage sports by congratulating students with trophies, and also provide free education for state-level and national-level players.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It's the best option to take admission in our college. Infrastructure and hostel facilities are nice

content.Placements: At present, 30% of students are placed, and the remaining students are participating in placements now. The highest package this year is 16 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA this year. Most companies that visited our college are Infosys, Cognizant, LTI, and Darwinbox. 40% of students got internship opportunities, and the top role is software engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are very good in the hostel and college. They provide all the needed infrastructure to the students, and all are very clean and neat. Food is also not bad, and it is average in my opinion, and the college looking wise is very nice, and no other issues regarding facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: Mohan Babu University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Admission Process

paragraphs: MBU admissions 2025for all courses are now open. The University accepts applications online through its official website MBU. The eligibility criteria for admission to the University are based on merit and entrance-based criteria. The University administers its entrance examination namelyMBUCET. In addition to the MBU common entrance examination, the University also administers various national-level entrance exams like JEE Main and JEE Advanced for admission to BTech, offered by theMBU School of Engineering and Computing.
Mohan Babu University offers over 50+ courses at the undergraduate level and postgraduate level through six schools and the names of the schools are listed below:

To secure admission to Mohan Babu University courses, the candidates should meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and apply to that course through the official website. The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for Mohan Babu University Courses:

MBU admission processbegins with applying to the course via the MBU official website followed by appearing for the selection process and then receiving the final admission offer. The stepwise detailed MBU admission process is given below:
Step 1: MBU Application Process

Candidates seeking admission at Mohan Babu University need to apply for their desired course through the MBU official website before the application deadline. The candidates need to pay the MBU application fee amounting to INR 500, which is non-refundable.
Step 2: MBU Selection Rounds

Aspirants need to appear for the entrance exam MBU accepts for admission to a particular course. Mohan Babu University conductsMBUCETfor admission to BTech courses.Candidates appearing in the exam must note that MBUCET syllabus is based on Class 11 and Class 12 topics.
Step 3: MBA Final Admission
Selected candidates need to pay the admission confirmation fee to secure their seats

faqs.question: What are the admission criteria for the BTech programme at Mohan Babu University?
faqs.answer: Admission to the BTech degree at MBU is entrance-based. The candidate should be qualified in MBUCET, or alternatively, can apply based on their JEE Main, JEE Advanced, or APEAMCET scores. The course is presented in full-time mode with a duration of four years. Satisfaction of the eligibility criteria and holding a valid score in the entrance exam is compulsory for admission.

faqs.question: What is the duration and mode of study for the BTech programme at Mohan Babu University?
faqs.answer: The BTech course at Mohan Babu University is a four-year undergraduate programme. It is provided in full-time mode under the School of Engineering and Computing. The course consists of theoretical knowledge, practical training, and industry-based learning. Practical experience is gained through labs, projects, and internships.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBU?

placement_data.title: Mohan Babu University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Career Development Centre (CDC) of Mohan Babu University is primarily focused on assisting students in developing their ability to assess opportunities and understand the actions, decisions, and information necessary to transform a job opportunity into a significant career milestone. MBU has offered over 6,000 placements in over 250 MNCs over the last three years.

Recently, Mohan Babu University has concluded the placements for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, 112 recruiters participated in the placement process and offered 2084 job offers to the batch 2024. The highest package offered during Mohan Babu University placements in 2024 stood at INR 60 LPA . This package was offered by Google. Further, Amazon offered the second highest package of INR 45 LPA. Additionally, 45% of students were placed in MNCs with packages exceeding INR 6 LPA. The top recruiters of Mohan Babu University in 2024 included Google , Infosys, Accenture, Amazon, HCL, TCS , Deloitte , etc.

hostel.description:
24/7 supply of water and electricity., CCTV monitoring and security guards. 
Wi-Fi and internet facilities inside the campus.
1000 Rooms are available

library.description:
The Central library of MBU is the one of the biggest treasures and a remarkable place for the reader's community. It serves the prime objective of supporting the academics and research programs of the institute by offering various physical and online resources. 

Spread across three centrally air-conditioned floors, the library has Wi-Fi and caters to the reading capacity of six hundred readers. It is home to a massive collection of 1,42,422 volumes and approx. 22,000 titles. The library has a fully automated Integrated Library Management System (ILMS) through KOHA software for all the library-related services and an RFID based circulation system. 

The Central Library proudly possesses a magnanimous collection of various textbooks, E-books, E-journals from paramount publications across many genres and subjects, along with video lectures. It has everything you need to quench your thirst for knowledge. The library also has high-quality reprographics and print facilities. The Digital Library is equipped with sixty high configuration computers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Squash Court, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, strict rules. More feels worst food, no enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Forest food, good rooms, good infrastructure and the facilities are available in the subject Analog Electronics in the place of IPS. We are in a meeting with the team and we will be upgraded to Platinum Debit Cars and this is the first option for you.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructures is very good.
reviews.review_text: Libraries are pretty good in our university. The hostel facilities are average and comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available in campus if a student falls sick. The sports and game facilities are nice, and students can play different games to stay healthy and enjoy their free time. They also take us to tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Dream, believe, and achieve.
reviews.review_text: We have very good infrastructure in our college. Library is the best part of our college. They provide Wi-Fi too. Faculty in Mohan Babu University are above average. They have good content and more information about subjects. Hostels are not that good but we can stay. The food they provide is average. In Mohan Babu University, they conduct many games and also take us to other tournaments.

reviews.review_heading: Offers good infrastructure, average faculty, and improving placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. We have been provided with a very vast and extraordinary library. The college also has a very big playground. They conduct sports days and encourage sports by congratulating students with trophies, and also provide free education for state-level and national-level players.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best option to take admission in our college. Infrastructure and hostel facilities are nice
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in the hostel and college. They provide all the needed infrastructure to the students, and all are very clean and neat. Food is also not bad, and it is average in my opinion, and the college looking wise is very nice, and no other issues regarding facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The year with a lot of future goals and memories upcoming.
reviews.review_text: My hostel is 4-room sharing. It is good, ventilated, and comfortable. We have emergency services along with it. Sometimes we have fun activities, and we have a good food menu and 24/7 Wi-Fi. We also have CCTV cameras and washing machines to wash clothes, and we also have many permissions.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is good, I would rate it 5 star.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. It feels very aesthetic. You can enjoy your college life. When it comes to college, it is very pleasant. College hostels are very good and spacious, and the fee is high. But the infrastructure for both college and hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college and I do not regret joining.
reviews.review_text: In my hostel fee structure is good. Food is not good and many students are suffering from health issues due to the inequality in maintaining food quality. Most people are facing this situation in every hostel not adjusting. Rooms are sufficient, but not properly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: It's a waste of college and a waste of money to invest, so I don't suggest this college.
reviews.review_text: I didn't like anything in my college library, which is just awesome, but the faculty and the rest are the worst. I don't suggest that anyone join this college for any of them. Faculty doesn't know anything. Only some of the faculty are knowledgeable persons.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very good.
reviews.review_text: The libraries in our university are good. Hostel facilities are comfortable for students. The food in the mess and canteen is mostly good, though sometimes it could be better. Medical facilities are available on campus for students who fall sick. Sports and game facilities are nice, allowing students to stay healthy and enjoy their free time.

reviews.review_heading: Dream. Believe. Achieve. Good infrastructure, a central library, Security, and highly equipped labs.
reviews.review_text: Mohan Babu University is in the 150-200 band for its facilities and infrastructure. It is about 100 acres of land, a vast area. When it comes to labs, they are highly equipped with the latest and updated versions of equipment. The central library contains all domains of books, discussion halls, etc. The mess canteen and medical facilities are rated 4 out of 5. Regarding sports and games, there is a huge ground where students play all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are pretty impressive and good. They provide labs and all necessary instruments to the students. The library in our college is the most attractive thing in our college. We have many hostels in and out of the campus, and they provide us with good food. We also have a canteen. The ambiance and the food in the canteen are too good. We also have sports. They even conduct sports days, and they take the students who are interested in games to tournaments held in other sta...

reviews.review_heading: My university is good for improving our knowledge. It is a good environment to learn things.
reviews.review_text: We have free Wi-Fi, attached washrooms, and daily cleaning in the rooms and washrooms, and hygienic food. We have a library which is the centre of attraction in the whole campus, which is full AC on three floors, and we have a canteen which is named the Pops Canteen, and the college is full of free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: There are good facilities and good infrastructure. The placements are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department, like Wi-Fi and labs, are good. Mainly, the library is very good. The mess, canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are good. The hostels in Mohan Babu University were so good. Mainly, the washroom is cleaned daily.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not completely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not bad, but they have not reached our expectations. Wi-Fi trouble us sometimes. The best thing we have and we can use is the library, which contains more facilities. Spending more time there is great. The food tastes good sometimes, and worse sometimes, it depends. Coming to hostels, it's not as much as we expected.

This exchange provides a culture of ongoing learning and collaboration among students and faculty.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores does The Neotia University accept for admission to MBA?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty, a beautiful campus, nice people, and good placement.

review_content.Placements: 80-90% of students were placed. The average package is 4-5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, etc. 80% of students got internships at Spider X, Tata Motors, Wipro, Infosys, and other companies. Our top roles in these companies are web developer, software developer, data scientist, cloud engineer, and software tester.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have smart classrooms, Wi-Fi availability in hostels, a swimming pool, a multipurpose hall, playgrounds, and every sports facility, as well as a medical hub for health issues, cafeterias, and opportunities for singing, dancing, public speaking, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: TNU appears to offer a solid campus life with good infrastructure and helpful faculty.

review_content.Placements: For the academic year 2023–2024, TNU reported an overall 71.97 percent placement rate. For the CSE (AI & ML) stream specifically, 75–80 percent of students are placed when companies visited the campus. The average package is 4.5–5 LPA in 2024. During campus placements (in the 4th year), for CSE (AI & ML) the highest package is 15 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Some of the recruiting companies are Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS, HCL, and Lenskart.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is consistently described as spacious and well-equipped, with a "green, clean" environment and a variety of amenities. Classrooms are often smart and digital. smart boards and labs are available for various departments. The central library is frequently praised.

review_summary.college_name: The Neotia University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nautical Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good for knowledge but not for placement.

content.Placements: It was there some years ago, but since the year I joined, the placement has dropped, and only a few cadets are getting placed here. It's not even 50%. They're trying to place us, but not in good companies. Firstly, they assured us that they would provide 100% placement, but I can't see them staying true to their word.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good when it was built, but the maintenance by the college is very poor. They choose the cheapest way to repair and use that material for a long time. Accommodation isn't enough for boys who stay in a group in one room. The food quality isn't too good; we have to raise our voice every time for food.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(March-2026)- B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very happy, absolutely satisfied.

content.Placements: Our batch has students from CSE (AI&ML). Overall, it is a very active and successful batch. The placement record of our course is quite good compared to other streams in the same year. Almost 75-80 percent of students are placed in various reputed companies. The average package is 4-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and supports the overall academic environment, with spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with proper seating arrangements, all classes containing projects and Wi-Fi, a library, and good sports facilities on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty, a beautiful campus, nice people, and good placement.

content.Placements: 80-90% of students were placed. The average package is 4-5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, Infosys, Tata Motors, etc. 80% of students got internships at Spider X, Tata Motors, Wipro, Infosys, and other companies. Our top roles in these companies are web developer, software developer, data scientist, cloud engineer, and software tester.
content.Infrastructure: We have smart classrooms, Wi-Fi availability in hostels, a swimming pool, a multipurpose hall, playgrounds, and every sports facility, as well as a medical hub for health issues, cafeterias, and opportunities for singing, dancing, public speaking, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: TNU appears to offer a solid campus life with good infrastructure and helpful faculty.

content.Placements: For the academic year 2023–2024, TNU reported an overall 71.97 percent placement rate. For the CSE (AI & ML) stream specifically, 75–80 percent of students are placed when companies visited the campus. The average package is 4.5–5 LPA in 2024. During campus placements (in the 4th year), for CSE (AI & ML) the highest package is 15 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Some of the recruiting companies are Wipro, Tech Mahindra, TCS, HCL, and Lenskart.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is consistently described as spacious and well-equipped, with a "green, clean" environment and a variety of amenities. Classrooms are often smart and digital. smart boards and labs are available for various departments. The central library is frequently praised.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued(March-2026)- B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The facilities and the quality of education could be improved, somehow, I am satisfied.

content.Placements: Around 30 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 12LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. TCS and Wipro are recruiting companies. 90% of the students got internships in Weble, Dataapace Academy, AI labs, etc. Roles offered are Trainer, Analyst, etc. So not that much, but my college gives placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good, it's a green campus, trees are planted everywhere, and each department has a separate building. Roads are good, and hostels are also good. But classrooms are non-AC and desks vary in each class. And also, it's too hot in the summer in the classes.

admission_overview.title: The Neotia University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: The Neotia University admission is primarily entrance-based. The university provides several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Computer Applications, Microbiology, Science, Management, and more. The admission process for the university commences online. Also known as TNU, students are accepted based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for The Neotia University.

paragraphs: The Neotia University admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university provides several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral courses in the fields of Engineering, Architecture, Computer Applications, Microbiology, Science, Management, and more. The admission process for the university commences online. Also known asTNU, students are accepted based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. Interested students can read the following article to know about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for The Neotia University.

The Neotia University course admissionis subject to clearance of the preset eligibility. Students seeking to enrol in any of the offered courses are required to qualify for the admission criteria and apply as per the university's guidelines. Those seeking admission into the UG courses need to have passed Class 12 with relevant subjects. Similarly, for PG admissions. candidates must have passed graduation. To get into the PhD courses, students need to have a PG degree in the relevant field. Additionally, candidates must appear for the entrance test/ PI conducted by the university. Students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria forTNU courses:
Class 12 with 60% aggregate in the Science stream from a recognised board
Class 12 with 60% aggregate in Science stream (55% for BSc- RMI, 50% for BHHA, BHHA with Swiss Diploma) from a recognised board
Class 12 with 50% to 60% aggregate in relevant stream from a recognised board
BSc with 55% aggregate in a relevant discipline from a recognised university
BTech/ BE with 60% aggregate in a relevant discipline from a recognised university
Class 12 with 60% aggregate from a recognised board
Class 12 with 50% aggregate in Commerce stream from a recognised board
Bachelor's degree with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
Master's degree with at least 55% aggregate from a recognised university
Step 1: TNU Application Process

Candidates can participate in the TNU admission process by filling out an application form in online mode. Candidates can either visit the official website. They also must pay an application fee for UG & PG courses at the time of submitting the application form.
Step 2: TNU Selection Round

The Neoti University admissions are entrance-based. Students are offered admission based on candidates' past academic merit for UG & PG courses, respectively. For UG courses, students need to appear for the entrance exam conducted by the university. However, for PG courses, candidates must also appear for the PI round.
Step 3: TNU Final Admission

placement_report.college_name: The Neotia University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Neotia University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Neotia University (TNU) provides mandatory Internship Programmes for all Undergraduate and Postgraduate Students. As part of the course curriculum, Neotia University students have interned at various Corporate Houses, Research Institutes, and Healthcare Organizations, such as WABCO, Amazon Development Centre India, Serum Institute of India, NIMHANS, Apollo Gleneagles, Hyatt Regency, The Lalit Great Eastern, and many more.

Neotia University has released the placement stats for the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, Neotia University recorded 71.97% overall placements in the academic year 2023-2024. A total of 503 students registered for the placement assistance of which 362 were placed in reputed companies. The Neotia University average package offered to the CSE Data Science students in 2024 stood at INR 4.2 LPA . Further, the average package offered to BBA and BA LLB students during Neotia University placements in 2024 was INR 4.22 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively.

The participating recruiters placed 18 BBA students, 7 BCom, 3 BA LLB, 4 BBA LLB, 45 BHM students during Neotia University placements 2024. The top recruiters of Neotia University in 2024 included QSpiders, TCS, Intellipaat, Lenskart , Wipro, Tech Mahindra, HCL, Trident , etc.

faqs.question: Does Neotia University really provide 100% placements with good average salaries?
faqs.answer: Neotia University offers decent placements annually for courses like BTech, BBA, BCom, BPharma, etc. The Neotia University average package offered to the CSE Data Science students in 2024 stood at INR 4.2 LPA. Further, the average package offered to BBA and BA LLB students during Neotia University placements in 2024 was INR 4.22 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. The following table showcases the course-wise and branch-wise Neotia University average package offered to the batch 2024: Branch/Course Average Package (2024) CSE Cyber Security INR 4.08 LPA CSE Data Science INR 4.2 LPA CSE AI / ML INR 3.82 LPA CSE ROBOTICS INR 3.81 LPA M.Sc Biotechnology INR 2.5 LPA BBA INR 4.22 LPA B.Com INR 1.97 LPA BA LLB INR 3 LPA BBA LLB INR 2 LPA BHM INR 2.33 LPA MHM INR 3.01 LPA BMLT INR 2.33 LPA Optometry INR 3 LPA Physiotheraphy INR 3.23 LPA MSc Applied Psychology INR 2.16 LPA SHCA INR 3.12 LPA B.Pharm INR 2.55 LPA Agriculture INR 2.62 LPA Agronomy INR 3.12 LPA MRE 400 USD BNS 480 USD

description: Neotia University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to multiple courses. Refer to the sections below to view the Neotia University WBJEE cutoff 2025, along with other exams for different courses, rounds and categories, etc. Other exam-related updates are below:

Neotia University WBJEE cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released for selecting students for B.E. / B.Tech courses. For General All India category, the last round closing ranks were in the range of 52429 to 90385 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 52429, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) emerged as the most challenging specialisation for admission.

Neotia University B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, along with past two years cutoff details are tabulated below for different courses, specialisations, rounds and categories, etc. For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive specialisations were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Robotics and Automation and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with WBJEE last round closing ranks of 52429, 80960 an

The WBJEE 2025 cutoff was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The seat allocation was based on the candidate's rank, preferences, and seat availability. Candidates who appeared for the entrance exam, followed by its counselling process, can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise WBJEE cutoff lists for Neotia University.

In this section candidates can refer to the table below to do a comparison analysis of different BE/BTech specialisations available at colleges accepting WBJEE for admission. The below data is for the General AI category students. To do the comparison based on other parameters, such as location, gender, categories, etc., use the provided filters.

Neotia University accepts West Bengal ANM/GNM Nursing scores for admission to the Nursing Midwife (GNM) course. As per the Neotia University cutoff 2023, the last round closing cutoff was 81872 for the General AII India category candidates. Refer to the table below to check out the cutoff in detail.

hostel_campus.college_name: The Neotia University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 4 nos. of hostels inside the boundary wall of campus, out of which 3 hostels are for boys and girls accommodating no. mention above with dedicated canteen and common rooms in each hostel building with security guards and power backup 24x7. There are 604 students staying in hostels within the campus boundary, out which there are 140 girls students and 460 boys.

library.description: The university library has the collection of 41000 books from 5022 titles. The library also has the subscription of 71 National and International Journals allowing the students to access 87063 nos. of e-books and online journals. The library provides the facilities of e-learning through online Web and Video courses in Engineering, Sciences, Technology provided by National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis, Volleyball Court

There are 604 students staying in hostels within the campus boundary, out which there are 140 girls students and 460 boys.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Table Tennis, Volleyball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Medical Lab, Physics Lab, Applied Mechanics Lab, Seamanship Lab, Material Testing Lab, Electrical Machinery Lab, Electrical Measurement Lab, Control and Simulator Lab, Bridge Simulator Lab, Food Production Labs

reviews.review_heading: Good for knowledge but not for placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was good when it was built, but the maintenance by the college is very poor. They choose the cheapest way to repair and use that material for a long time. Accommodation isn't enough for boys who stay in a group in one room. The food quality isn't too good; we have to raise our voice every time for food.

reviews.review_heading: I am very happy, absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good and supports the overall academic environment, with spacious and well-ventilated classrooms with proper seating arrangements, all classes containing projects and Wi-Fi, a library, and good sports facilities on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, a beautiful campus, nice people, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms, Wi-Fi availability in hostels, a swimming pool, a multipurpose hall, playgrounds, and every sports facility, as well as a medical hub for health issues, cafeterias, and opportunities for singing, dancing, public speaking, etc.

reviews.review_heading: TNU appears to offer a solid campus life with good infrastructure and helpful faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus is consistently described as spacious and well-equipped, with a "green, clean" environment and a variety of amenities. Classrooms are often smart and digital. smart boards and labs are available for various departments. The central library is frequently praised.

reviews.review_heading: The facilities and the quality of education could be improved, somehow, I am satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good, it's a green campus, trees are planted everywhere, and each department has a separate building. Roads are good, and hostels are also good. But classrooms are non-AC and desks vary in each class. And also, it's too hot in the summer in the classes.

reviews.review_heading: This college is capable for higher studies .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are good. Classrooms are digital, and every lab is present in the department for each subject. Library is also present in the department. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is not bad. Hostel graduation are here in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of agriculture department.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has excellent infrastructure and facilities for students. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and there is a swimming pool and a gym for the students. The labs are equipped with modern machines and equipment, which the students can use for experiments.

reviews.review_heading: This college is also good for higher studies and to pursue a better career.
reviews.review_text: The library is also present in our department. The classroom is digital. Labs are present in our department for each subject. The university campus is big. Two football grounds are present, one of them small and the other is big.

reviews.review_heading: This college is also good for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college. All facilities are available in our department. The library and digital classroom room also present. Labs were present in the department for each subject. CCTV is available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, average faculty members, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a resourceful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms. Mess food is average but hygienic. Medical aid is available, and sports/games facilities support overall development.

reviews.review_heading: Don't miss the chance to study at this university.
reviews.review_text: To be honest, infrastructure is one of the best we have. Library, classroom, and labs are well decorated, neat and clean, and AC is provided with wi-fi. All facilities we are getting in hostel.

reviews.review_heading: In our department, 90% placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the Wi-Fi network is fast. The library and classes are good. Some classrooms have AC, but not all. Medical facilities are also present here that help you always.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent infrastructure that creates a supportive and comfortable learning environment. The classrooms were spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with modern teaching aids such as smart boards and projectors. The library was well stocked with a wide range of academic resources, reference books, and access to a digital learning platform.

reviews.review_heading: Great infra, average faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a resourceful library. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms. The mess food is average but hygienic. Medical aid is available, and sports/games facilities support overall development.

reviews.review_heading: Green campus, average study.
reviews.review_text: I would genuinely say that the infrastructure can be better, and on the other hand, the facilities are quite good. Just a few classrooms and labs have AC, the rest of the others just have ceiling fans. Wi-Fi is mostly available everywhere on the campus. The central library is very huge and a good place to study.

college_info.college_name: The Neotia University

data.description: Yes, The Neotia University offers hostel facilities to students. However, there are limited rooms and hence, the admission is provided on a 'First Come, First Serve' basis. The university offers double-occupancy and triple-occupancy rooms. The hostel fee for the batch of 2025-26 is INR 45,000 per semester . Additionally, candidates must pay a one-time Hostel Security fee of INR 23,000. Out of the total security fee, INR 15,000 is refundable.

college_info.college_name: The Neotia University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: The Neotia University offers several merit-based and need-based scholarships and sponsorships to deserving students. The university offers these scholarships in the form of fee waivers ranging from 25% to 100% on tuition fees.

Neotia University offers a list of scholarships for Indian, Nepal, and Bhutan international students based on students' marks in their last qualifying examination. For UG courses, scholarships will be given based on Class 12 (best of 5 subjects)/ Diploma. For PG, overall graduation marks will be considered. TNU doesn't have any fixed number of students to avail of the scholarships offered, and if a student is eligible as per the set criteria then he or she will be able to avail the scholarships. The table below lists the various TNU scholarships along with their percentage of scholarships:
Sports Scholarship

Note: Apart from the above-mentioned criteria, scholarship percentages also vary depending on students' financial condition, cultural participation, and sports championships. Also, students are eligible for financial support from only one scheme, multiple scholarships cannot be awarded to a single student.
tables: For UG Courses - Class 12 (best of 5 subjects) / Diploma Marks
Sarvodaya Scholarship(in the memory of Late Suresh Kumar Neotia)
Gramotthan Scholarship(Students from Gram Panchayat area of South 24 Parganas)
Special Hill Students'Scholarship (Students from GTA Area (W.B), North-East States, Andaman and The Nicobar Islands, Nepal & Bhutan)
Sahodarya Scholarship(Siblings of all students - present or passed out)
Mere Apna Scholarship(For Ambuja Neotia Group employees - in the memory of Late Vinod Kumar Neotia
60% to more than 70% Any Recognised Board / University
i) Yearly Family income should be less than 2.5 Lakhs ii) An interview and document verification will be done by an empowered committee decided by the University's Management
As Decided by the Empowered Committee (Upto 100%)

college_info.college_name: Oriental University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary:
The CLAT PG 2026 third merit list is out for Oriental University admission to the PG-level LLM programme. The fourth merit list will be out on May 2, 2026 (10 PM).

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Oriental University's popular programmes are MBA, BTech, and BSc. The university offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Oriental University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, HR, IT, Marketing, Data Analytics, and others. The below-mentioned are Oriental University's popular programmes:
For more information about Oriental University check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    The list of leading corporate giants that participated in Oriental University Indore placements over the past few years is presented below:Oriental University Placements: Top RecruitersAxis BankZomatoDeltaxAonTCSHyundaiShadowfaxJBM Group
faqs.question: Which companies are the top recruiters at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    The median package offered to the students pursuing BTech at Oriental University fluctuates every year. Based on the latest NIRF Report 2024 for Engineering at the university, the median pacakge offered across various BTech streams was INR 3.2 LPA in 2023. In 2022, the median package offered during BTech placements at the university was INR 3 LPA. The median package offered to BTech students in 2024 will be released with the release of NIRF report 2025.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered to B.Tech students at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall highest package for the academic year 2023-24 stood at INR 72 LPA. The table below mentions the Oriental University highest package for 2024:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)Highest packageINR 72 LPANOTE: The above salary data is gathered from the official website. However, the year of placements is not mentioned, hence, considered it for 2024.
faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    According to unofficial online sources, the majority of Oriental University alumni are working in the Engineering sector with a 23% share. The pie chart below illustrates the detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni:NOTE: The sectors involved in the 'Others' category are IT, Human Resources, and Marketing.
faqs.question: Where are Oriental University alumni placed?

faqs.answer: A:    Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. Other components included in the Oriental University fees are one-time fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the course fee for four years B.Tech at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Oriental University is both entrance-based and merit-based. For undergraduate technical courses, admission is through the 12th percentage and national level test JEE. However, for other courses, admission is granted based on the 12th standard marks itself.So, while some courses may require an entrance exam, others may not. It’s recommended to check the specific admission criteria for the course you’re interested in on the official Oriental University website or admission portalThe basic eligibility for students seeking admission to the B.Tech course includes passing the 10+2 exam with Physics, Maths, and Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology/Vocational Sciences as main subjects through a recognised board or university with a minimum of 45% marks.I hope this information helps! If you have any other questions, feel free to ask.
faqs.question: Can students join Oriental University directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from 2nd April 2026 to 9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.
faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who are interested in admission at Oriental University MBA course in any specialisation must have passed graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate marks for General category and 45% aggregate marks for SC/ST/OBC. Admissions at Oriental University are based on national-level entrance examinations. Therefore, in addition to meeting the basic eligibility criteria, candidates have to appear for either CAT or MAT examination to be considered for the admission process.

college_info.college_name: Oriental University Fees 2026

Oriental University fee structure for all courses consists of various components, namely tuition, security deposit, and hostel fee, etc. Among these components, some are to be paid only once during Oriental University admission, while the remaining are charged according to the fee guidelines. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Pharma at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University offers a BPharma programme that lasts four years. Apart from the regular BPharma programme, the university also offers BPharma (Lateral Entry) programme. The duration of this programme is three years. overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee for four years B.Tech at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. Other components included in the Oriental University fees are one-time fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The mentioned fee has been sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is B.Pharma available at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is available at Oriental University. The university admits students to its BPharma programme through the regular and the lateral entry mode. The durations of the regular BPharma programme and the lateral entry programme are four and three years, respectively. The university's Faculty of Pharmacy provides the programme. The total fee for the regular BPharma programme is INR 3.4 lakh. Eligible candidates can register for BPharma at Oriental University through the university's official website.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 72 LPA, the lowest is 2.0 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA in my course. Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and Co and Trilegal are the top recruiting companies. The percentage of students placed is 70 to 77 percent in the above-named companies and in Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Indus Law, P&A Law Offices, etc. Roles offered are Advocates, advisory, legal firm, corporate lawyers, in-house counsel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory here for everyone, and a gym facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.

content.Placements: The college placement drive is impressive, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package offered is 72 LPA. Top recruiters like TCS, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro, and HCL provided diverse and rewarding opportunities, reflecting strong industry connections.
content.Infrastructure: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is the best.

content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.

content.Placements: Hello, I’m Asutosh Pastor. I enrolled in Oriental University Indore in September 2024 for B.Tech. In my class, there are 60 students. My fee is 70,000, and the actual fee is 75,000. Since I got 70% in Class 12, I received a discount. However, I asked for more discounts because I belong to the EWS category, but they did not provide any discounts for EWS. They only provide discounts for OBC and SC categories. The college and hostel are decent. .
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

admission_overview.college_name: Oriental University Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: Oriental University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Oriental University admission is offered on both academic merit and entrance test scores depending on the programme. The university provides courses at UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Agriculture, Engineering, Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, and more. Interested students can register themselves on the Oriental University admission portal at admission.oui.edu.in. The mode of application available is both online and offline. Students who wish to apply offline, have to visit the Oriental University, Indore campus along with relevant documents. The complete admission process is based on the respective entrance examination. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Oriental Univeristy.

eligibility_selection.title: Oriental University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Oriental University course admissions are offered based on preset admission criteria. The university shorlists students based on respective national-level entrance examinations or academic merit in the qualifying exam. The accepted tests include JEE/ CUET/ CLAT/ CAT/ UCEED, and more. However, merit is also considered selective programmes, such as BA, BPharma, BSc, etc. The university offers its courses through various departments. These focus in the key area of specialisations, such as Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, and more. It is important that the applicants fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. The admission requirements for popular Oriental University courses are as below:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Oriental University admission?

paragraphs: The admission process for Oriental University is conducted online via the official website of the university. Students need to submit valid entrance scores or provide scores in the last qualifying exam to be eligible. The university conducts a common admission process for all of its courses. Find below the steps to complete theOriental University admission process:
Oriental University Indore Application Process 2026

Visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired programme by filling the application form. The Common Application Form may be collected physically from the admission office of the university. Students have to submit the form with documents & application fees.
Oriental University Selection Process 2026

Students are shortlisted based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam or score secured by them in the last qualifying exam. Students also have to appear for counselling rounds to get selected. The rounds are divided into different phases. It is also applicable to get the scholarships.
Oriental University Admission Confirmation 2026
Students can pay theOriental University admission feesand go through verification of documents for seat confirmation.

The Oriental University fee structure changes depending on the programme, specialisation, and category. Students have to pay the fees through accepted payment gateway before the last date. The total fees include different components. Some of these are tuition fees, exam fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more.

Aspiring students need to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board to be eligible for admission into the university. Find below key highlights forOriental University BA admission:

faqs.question: What are the BA courses offered by Oriental University?
faqs.answer: Oriental University offers BA course across multiple specialisations. The basic eligibility required to get into this course is Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Find below the list of BA courses offered by the university:Political ScienceSociologyHistoryEconomicsHindiPsychologyJournalism and Mass CommunicationYoga

faqs.question: How many students can do BTech at Oriental University?
faqs.answer: The total seats at Oriental University for BTech are cumulative of seats among various BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. The university has over 240 seats for BTech. There are 60 seats each for BTech in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, and Electrical and Electronics Engineering. The exact number of seats for BTech in CSE is not available. It must be noted that the mentioned number of seats has been taken from the off

faqs.question: Are BPharma admissions at Oriental University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Oriental University BPharma admissionis merit-based. The admission is granted based on the marks of Class 12. There is no entrance exam required for the admission. Candidates just need to register and submit an online application of the official website of the university. The seats are allotted in multiple rounds of admission. Candidates must ensure their eligibility before applying.

placement_data.title: Oriental University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released a few placement statistics for the 2025 drive as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements.

Earlier, over 1,157 placements were made to the 2024 passing-out batch and Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of placements offered (186). In addition to this, the University has a legacy of 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA . Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA . The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai , and many others.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Oriental University?
faqs.answer: The University offers 100% placement assistance to its students. As per the official brochure, 886 placements were made during the academic year 2024-25. However, the placement sessioon is still ongoing. Earlier, the highest and average packages offered during the 2024 drive were INR 72 LPA and INR 5.30 LPA, respectively. Check the complete insights of Oriental University placements 2024 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Highest package INR 72 LPA Average package INR 5.30 LPA Placement assistance 100% Campus placements 35,000+ Prominent recruiters 450+ Popular recruiters JBM Group, WNS, Piramal Healthcare NOTE: The above details are fetched from the official brochure 2025. However, the year of placements is not mentioned, hence, considered it for 2024.

faqs.question: What are student reviews on B.Sc placements at Oriental University?
faqs.answer: Based on the Oriental University reviews available on Shiksha.com, it can be said that the university provides placement assistance to its students. The overall rating for placements at the university is 3/5. There is only one review available for BSc at Oriental University. The reviewer is a former student of BSc (Hons) in Agriculture at the university. Talking about the placements, the reviewer (Tanisha Jain) asserted "The average salary package offered ranges from 6 LPA to 7 LPA, and in some cases, it goes up to 20 LPA. The placements process is average, depending on the students how much effort they put in. Good companies come for placements in this college."

hostel_campus.college_name: Oriental University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.
reviews.review_text: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.
reviews.review_text: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in this range. If you have no other choices, you can apply to this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure and facilities are good.  
Wi-Fi is available but on the first floor.  
Canteen is all okay.  
Library is all good. I like it.  
Classrooms are spacious.  
And just labs are also okay.  
Sports may happen sometimes or not.  
Medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and the environment of college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are available. Food available in canteen is good, but the food in the mess is average. Environment is library is quite peaceful, we can study there without any disturbance and Wi-Fi is also available. Every floor has a lift and labs are available for practical .

reviews.review_heading: The college and the facilities or infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi surveillance is available, and the smart classroom and the central library are located, and many other classes. The quality of food is average in the mess. There are four-time meals in the mess. A canteen is also located.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Oriental University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is really vast, with labs for practical knowledge. The university also provides hostel facilities for students from different cities. The hostel provides mess facilities as well as Wi-Fi. Regional festivals of students from different states are also celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Why Oriental University Indore is good for you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good; allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Why choose Oriental University, Indore?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, spacious, and overall a good environment. Classrooms are good, and the library is good. Every book related to the course is available. Only the library has that there is no Wi-Fi all over campus. Food in the canteen is excellent. Sports facilities are less regular, not sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Oriental University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is good and management of the university is good canteens are well arranged and good food is provided. Furthermore, hostels are well-designed and maintained, and the meals are tasty. Many courses are available at our university with nice arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: The dream university: Oriental.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good, allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college value for money good at .
reviews.review_text: Excellent library, big classrooms with projector, advanced labs with wi-fi facilities are available. Well qualified faculty members are also there. Teaching method of faculty members is also very good. Hostel provides all necessary facilities like wi-fi,  24*7 water combined bathrooms with rooms, indoor badminton court, cctv, nice balcony with room of three types-  single, double and triple seater. Mess is also very good, it provides healthy and hygienic food at proper time. Mess is very clean. ...

reviews.review_heading: My college provides all activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries, which are well organized, and their labs are digital. In the hostel, all facilities are good, like mess food, which is hygienic, and medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

college_info.college_name: Oriental University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Yes, BTech aspirants at Oriental University can avail a fee rebate under OU-Aspire scholarship provided by the university. The merit-based scholarships at Oriental University are awared to the BTech students based on their merit in JEE Main or HSC. Based on the information available on the university's official website, an applicant with a JEE (Main) rank under 5 Lacs is eligible for a fee rebate under Criteria 1 of OU-Aspire scholarship. If the candidate is pursuing BTech in a stream other than CSE, their annual fee will be reduced from INR 40,000 to INR 32,500. For students pursuing BTech in CSE, the fee amount will be reduced from INR 75,000 to INR 60,000. The mentioned information is subject to change and hence, is indicative.
