faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for the M.Tech course at Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal is that the candidate should have graduated in Engineering./ Technology with a minimum of 50% aggregate. For those belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh need a minimum of 45% aggregate in their graduation, a minimum of 45% aggregate in their graduation.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the M.Tech course at Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good.

review_content.Placements: About 70% students got placed in my batch. The highest package is 72 LPA, and the average is about 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Jio, TCS, Wipro, and HCL. About all students got internships in data science, the top role is a data analysis scientist. All I want to say is that the data science batch is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: In Oriental College, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are fully modern. In the library, there are all types of books available that you can borrow without paying. Also, you can use the library for extra time, and you can get all the facilities you need in your day-to-day life.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements for IT/CS/ECE, average for mechanical and civil.

review_content.Placements: Overall, college placements were good, especially for branches like IT, CS, and ECE which saw the highest placement rates. However, placements for mechanical and civil branches were quite poor, as very few mechanical companies visited for these streams. The positive part was that students from mechanical and civil could also apply for IT company roles. In terms of packages, they usually ranged from 3.5 LPA to around 11 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Department was somehow equipped with modern classrooms. We also had projector facilities, and dedicated computer labs. But machinery for partical knowledge was not up to the mark. Library was spacious, with a good collection of course books. The mess food was average. Sometimes repetitive but manageable. Canteen provided additional options, and was a good alternative for students looking for variety.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's a great college with good placement records.

content.Placements: Great placements are available, and good companies visit OCT as well for the placement of students. TCS and Infosys are the top recruiting companies here. Among 75% to 80% of students were placed here. Roles vary from one to another as per CGPA. The lowest package is Rs. 2,80,000.
content.Infrastructure: There's great infrastructure with grounds and good classrooms, an auditorium, seminar halls, and labs. Wi-Fi is available, but we don't use it. The library is great and well-furnished. I don't have much idea about the mess and hostels because I am not living there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are good, placements are also great, and the structure is also average.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in the scores is around 60 to 80%, and the highest package will be, I think, 30 LPA, and the average is 7-8 LPA. The top companies are TCS and Infosys, and 62-70% of students got internships in these companies. The roles offered in my course are often of different categories.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, the course is good, the department library, classrooms, everything is too good. Based on the infrastructure, you cannot judge a college, but it's great. description: Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 1117722 and 1474985 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 1117722, B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1404545.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 1117722.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Oriental College of Technology, Bhopal B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security), with last-round closing ranks of 1117722, 1248471, and 1255797, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: It's a great college with good placement records.
reviews.review_text: There's great infrastructure with grounds and good classrooms, an auditorium, seminar halls, and labs. Wi-Fi is available, but we don't use it. The library is great and well-furnished. I don't have much idea about the mess and hostels because I am not living there.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are good, placements are also great, and the structure is also average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, the course is good, the department library, classrooms, everything is too good. Based on the infrastructure, you cannot judge a college, but it's great. When it comes to the quality of facilities in my hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, it's great.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: In Oriental College, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are fully modern. In the library, there are all types of books available that you can borrow without paying. Also, you can use the library for extra time, and you can get all the facilities you need in your day-to-day life.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements for IT/CS/ECE, average for mechanical and civil.
reviews.review_text: Department was somehow equipped with modern classrooms. We also had projector facilities, and dedicated computer labs. But machinery for partical knowledge was not up to the mark. Library was spacious, with a good collection of course books. The mess food was average. Sometimes repetitive but manageable. Canteen provided additional options, and was a good alternative for students looking for variety.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely satisfactory and well-managed.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are good, including advanced-technology computer labs and a library with books for all relevant subjects for the course you have chosen. The quality of facilities in the hostel and the food quality is also awesome. Additionally, canteen and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: For students who want 100% placements with package above 10 LPA, then this college is not for them.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not so big, not so small, and average. Labs and the library are available. In the hostel, faculty members are average. The quality of food is also average. Medical faculty members are available for students. Sports and games are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is very poor. Lack of cleaning in the entire campus. Mess is so dirty, it's very hard to survive. Washrooms are so bad, not cleaned properly, so the college mess and canteen are only a waste of money. Surroundings of students in college are not like those of an engineering student.

reviews.review_heading: College is absolutely satisfied and well-managed.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good including advanced technology, computer, labs, and library with books for all relevant subjects for the course you have chosen. The quality of facilities in the hostel and food quality are also awesome. Canteen and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college is satisfied and well-managed.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good, including advanced technology computer labs and a library with books for all relevant subjects for the course you have chosen. The quality of facilities in the hostel and food quality are also awesome, and the canteen and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is going well here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of the college are not bad; the infrastructure is fabulous with the college building, mess, gym, boys' hostel, and girls' hostel. There is nothing to complain about; everything is acceptable and good as I expected when I joined the college in my 1st year.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, good campus life, average teaching, but it needs more industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, good computer labs, and a well-stocked library. Hostel rooms are decent with 24/7 water and electricity. Mess food is average but hygienic, and there’s a canteen too. The campus has playgrounds, a gym, and basic medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are not good. Hostel mess food is tasteless, and the canteen is in average condition. Sports and games are not available. Medical facilities are not present; if there is a big problem, they go to the hospital. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, but it is not available when the college is closed.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is totally fine with all the essential benefits.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good, with advanced computer labs for computer science students and other labs used by the students for their courses. The library is also available for students to issue books for their semester exams. The quality of facilities is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and facilities but faculty need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our college are neat and clean classrooms, perfect teaching by teachers, the best quality of the laboratories, and high Wi-Fi speed. The central library environment is also good, with computer facilities, and the department also includes seminar halls.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good and affiliated with RGPV.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay. Wi-Fi is available in labs. Classrooms and hostel facilities are good. The library is also available for both students and faculty members. In my college, we have classrooms, labs, a library, hostels, and a mess. The quality of the facility is good. Sports and events are organised by the college.

faqs.answer: A:    When compared to other universities, Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Lavale charges fair tuition for its B.E. in Instrumentation and Control programme. From the first to the last year, these costs range from 82,000 to 92,000 rupees. The cost of tuition for the third year is about 82,000 rupees. There are no additional fees, and no more fees are required to secure admission. College does not in any way levie a price. There is no need to pay additional tuition for college enrollment. Colleges do not engage in any type of black marketing. And individuals who exhibit this behaviour are subject to serious punishment. Yes, the college is transparent about the cost breakdown.

review_summary.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Lavale Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Corona batch 2024 overview.

content.Placements: 10% students got placed through college placements. The highest was 7.5 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA, and the average placement was 4.5 LPA. ITC and Amdocs were the top recruiting companies. 15% students got an internship in DRDO & IMD. While internships were implemented with last year's project for these companies.
content.Infrastructure: The library was good, with enough room for study, and the study material was at par, as much as required and sufficient. Wi-Fi were not allowed for students who were regular/day scholars. Classrooms were of average quality. The food in the mess was decent, but it used cheap oil. Medical facilities were not available in the college, while the nearest hospital was 2 km away, and a medical practice centre was located beside the college. No sports facility, no ground available, only a small volleyball court.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Faculty and overall placement review, 2024.

content.Placements: Average placement status, mostly in the computer department. In 2024, only 3-4 companies visited, while in 2025, 4-6. Placement packages are approximately 3-5 LPA for freshers. Backlog and failing students are not allowed. No such top recruiting company. The highest package is 7.2 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.0 LPA. Median package is 3.5 to 4.0 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food in the mess is average, 2 days non-veg, while on other days veg. Wi-Fi is not allowed for students during college hours. The library is good overall. No good washrooms. The canteen was recently built and contains average food. Boys' hostels were too messy and were located above the college itself. One room contains 4-5 people. While no girls' hostel on campus, girls share the Katraj branch hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong academics, good placements, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: 60% of students are in computer engineering. The highest package is around 21 LPA. There are all types of companies, including national-level ones. They providing opportunities in competitions and making all the students capable of sharing their own ideas and creating next-level knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided, and each classroom has TV screens for studying. Windows are provided in the middle of the classrooms. The hostel is present in the college, so there is no need for traveling. Even if students live outside the hostel, a bus is provided with a sharp timetable. Therefore, both the hostel and other nearby areas are good for studies.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Chose it for the teacher, stayed for the pace. Great subjects, Hill campus.

content.Placements: I'm Aditya, a 2nd-year computer engineering student. Around 80% of students from my branch got placed with the highest package of 19 LPA, with an average of 6-7 LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, Infosys, and Bosch. About 65% landed internships at Cognizant, Live Gaea, and Decimal Teach. Roles offered are SDE, Analyst, and DevOps.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are well-equipped, the classrooms are clean and teacher-enabled, and the library's a great spot for focused study. Hostel facilities are decent, and food is improving. Wi-Fi works fine in most areas. Sports, gym, and medical support add to a healthy, balanced campus life.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Educated and qualified faculty.

content.Placements: In Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, Lavale, the average placement rate is 70%-80%. Major recruiting companies are Mahidra, TCS, and many more. Placement rate is moderate with decent packages, like 5 LPA to 12 LPA. In the current years, the highest package for the computer branch is 19 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is good, but it is lacking an entry gate with complete construction. But the interior and classrooms are very good. The college has a good Wi-Fi network and a decent library. Hostel rooms are decent with Wi-Fi facilities. The quality of food available in the college mess is below average, they are not providing proper food. Our college doesn't have proper grounds for sports. But college staff are always trying to take various games or competitions in college.

admission_process.title: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Lavale Admission 2025

paragraphs: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering admission 2025(admission form) is currently open. The college offers BE courses at the UG level. To be admitted to the Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. The application process at theBharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineeringis conducted online. BVCE is affiliated toSavitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). Read the following article to know more about the Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineeringcourse admission2025.

BVCE courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection forBharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% for backward class and Economically Weaker Section and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) withPhysicsand Mathematics as compulsory subjects
JEE Main,MHT CET

The college offers a total of 360 seats for the BE course. majority of seats are available for BE in Computer Engineering, i.e., 120. Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering tuition fee for BE course is in between INR 2.6 lakh-INR 3.4 lakh. For more clarity, students can check the table presented below:
Course Name
Tuition Fee
INR 2.6 lakh-INR 3.4 lakh

Bharati Vidyapeeth College's admission process includes registration and merit-list preparation of entrance exam score, i.e., JEE Main/MH CET. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in BVC:
STEP 1: Bharati Vidyapeeth College Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. Students can also check the detailedBharati Vidyapeeth College feestructure here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on their entrance exam scores. However, candidates also have to meet the eligibility criteria set by the college.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
description: Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 85212 and 262690 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 85212, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 54553.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 85212.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 51.57 and 92.04, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 92.04. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 51.57, Civil became the least

Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 92.04. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 92.53 in the General category under the HS quota.

Admissions at Bharati Vidyapeeth Lavale for B.E. / B.Tech are done on the basis of MHT CET percentiles. For the next academic session, students can find out more about the MHT CET 2026 important dates in the table below:

hostel_campus.college_name: Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering

hostel.description: The hostels are provided with WiFi facility, Geyser for hot water, RO system for drinking water, TV room, Everyday newspapers and a Gym. Student Mess on the Campus provides wholesome food to the students during breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

library.description: BVCOE has a central library with the collection of 1610 book titles and 9306 volumes, 42 Indian journals, and 1 online journals. For resource sharing, the library is an institutional member of British Library and American Library.

BVCOE has a central library with the collection of 1610 book titles and 9306 volumes, 42 Indian journals, and 1 online journals. For resource sharing, the library is an institutional member of British Library and American Library.

hostel.description: The hostels are provided with WiFi facility, Geyser for hot water, RO system for drinking water, TV room, Everyday newspapers and a Gym. Student Mess on the Campus provides wholesome food to the students during breakfast, lunch, and dinner.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Drawing Hall, Workshop

reviews.review_heading: Corona batch 2024 overview.
reviews.review_text: The library was good, with enough room for study, and the study material was at par, as much as required and sufficient. Wi-Fi were not allowed for students who were regular/day scholars. Classrooms were of average quality. The food in the mess was decent, but it used cheap oil. Medical facilities were not available in the college, while the nearest hospital was 2 km away, and a medical practice centre was located beside the college. No sports facility, no ground available, only a small volleyba...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and overall placement review,  2024.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food in the mess is average,  2 days non-veg, while on other days veg. Wi-Fi is not allowed for students during college hours. The library is good overall. No good washrooms. The canteen was recently built and contains average food. Boys' hostels were too messy and were located above the college itself. One room contains 4-5 people. While no girls' hostel on campus, girls share the Katraj branch hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics, good placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided, and each classroom has TV screens for studying. Windows are provided in the middle of the classrooms. The hostel is present in the college, so there is no need for traveling. Even if students live outside the hostel, a bus is provided with a sharp timetable. Therefore, both the hostel and other nearby areas are good for studies.

reviews.review_heading: Chose it for the teacher, stayed for the pace. Great subjects, Hill campus.
reviews.review_text: The labs are well-equipped, the classrooms are clean and teacher-enabled, and the library's a great spot for focused study. Hostel facilities are decent, and food is improving. Wi-Fi works fine in most areas. Sports, gym, and medical support add to a healthy, balanced campus life.

reviews.review_heading: Educated and qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good, but it is lacking an entry gate with complete construction. But the interior and classrooms are very good. The college has a good Wi-Fi network and a decent library. Hostel rooms are decent with Wi-Fi facilities. The quality of food available in the college mess is below average, they are not providing proper food. Our college doesn't have proper grounds for sports. But college staff are always trying to take various games or competitions in college.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, placements are good, and growing. The campus is beautiful but small.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good. Labs, digital classrooms, and computer labs are available. Hostel and mess are available, but a canteen is not. The food quality of the mess is average. The hostel is good, but the Wi-Fi is not available. They clean every day.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college, good placement, and the best mountain view.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are decent. Hostel rooms are really good as they were renovated last year due to the NAAC peer team visit. Decent food is provided in the mess. You get 4 meals a day in the canteen, which is on campus, and the sports facilities are available, like table tennis, chess, carrom, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average. The faculty is good. The infrastructure is poor. It is value for money.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is not good. The college does not have any type of sports ground or many facilities. Students self-contribute to purchase sports accessories. The college hostel is average, but the mess food is of low quality. The college campus has been under construction.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good enough. Infrastructure compromise here but crowd and faculty events up.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good enough. It is equipped with good Wi-Fi. Each class has a smart board for teaching. Labs are well-equipped with the instruments required. Even the library offers a variety of books. Quality of food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Very good faculty, average placements, and the infrastructure could have been better.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of labs for almost every subject, including computer labs, communication labs, simulation labs, digital electronics labs, etc. The classrooms are good, to be honest, every classroom has digital boards, a separate internet connection, and a good seating arrangement. If we talk about the hostel, It is average in terms of infrastructure as it is located on the top floor of the college building. The hostel mess is also average. Hostel does have Wi-Fi connectivity, but it barely gets...

reviews.review_heading: Decent college for education and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across the college, and the well-maintained library offers a quiet study space. Classrooms have digital boards, but lack space. The hostel has spacious rooms with basic furniture, but the Wi-Fi is poor, and mobile networks rarely work inside. There are limited toilets, water leakage during rains, and low-quality mess food are also issues. The college hospital provides free check-ups, but medicine is expensive. Sports opportunities are limited unless you're already skilled.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placement support and diverse opportunities.
reviews.review_text: There are dedicated labs for our course, i.e., VLSI, Electronic Lab, etc. We have access to industry-standard tools and software in our labs. There is a stocked library with quiet areas for study. There are separate hostels for boys and girls with 24x7 water and electricity supply. The cafeteria provides tasty and healthy foods.

reviews.review_heading: Read this before taking admission.
reviews.review_text: Poor quality of hostel and mess for boys because girls hostel is in the main branch about 25kms away from college which has decent facilities, boys hostels are in bad conditions, low Wi-Fi range and there are plastic walls while in rainy season there are leakages from the roof as the boys hostel is located above the college building. The quality of the food is only good during the time of admissions while after some time its quality tend to decrease and decrease, ZERO sports and games, no ground...

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Many laboratories are available for branches like Chemistry, Physics, Electronics, and computer science. Boys' hostel is available. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We also have a television room in this college. Games are conducted on our campus. We also have a gym facility in this college. Hot water facility is available 24X7. Free Wi-Fi is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: This college is under construction. The infrastructure is better. Laboratories are very good. Wi-Fi service does not reach the classrooms. The food served in the hostel is not good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Bharati Vidyapeeth College of Engineering, Lavale

reviews_list.review_title: Not only on campus our seniors shined in off-campus placements by achieving high packages.

review_content.Placements: Our seniors had secured around 60% of the packages, with the highest and lowest packages at 11 LPA and 3 LPA, respectively. Many famous companies recruit from our course, including Wipro, Infosys, and TCS. Most of our students have secured internships at companies such as Edutech and others, although I don't recall all of them. The top roles offered are data engineer, cloud engineer, data scientist, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: So the labs are full of good processing PCs and good internet connection through LAN and the classrooms and labs have their own projector. The library also has a wide variety of books related to courses and computer science and engineering subjects. I don't know about the hostel, but the canteen is good with proper management and cleanliness. Also, the college provides a free gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Value of money to get admission in JNEC college for MCA.

review_content.Placements: Hello friends, I am Darshan. I am pursuing my MCA from JNEC College of MGM University. My batch has approximately 26 students this year. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest package is below 10 LPA, and the average package is above 15 LPA. Companies like TCS and INFOSYS are recruiting from our batch. Students should have above 70% with a good CGPA to secure a good internship with TCS and Infosys.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college canteen also provides good quality food, and the taste is very delicious! A sports ground is available for outdoor activities, and there is also a separate gym and swimming pool for physical fitness to keep us fit and healthy.

faqs.answer: The selection for JNEC Aurangabad BTech course is based on PERA CET, MHT CET, JEE Main and MGMU-CET score. Additionally, candidates must pass HSC or its equivalent examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry or Biotechnology or Biology or Technical Vocational subject or Computer Science or Information Technology or Informatics Practices or Agriculture or Engineering Graphics or Business Studies with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate, in case of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) in the above subjects taken together to apply for BTech course. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. The total seat intake for BTech course is 630. individual_reviews.title: College is good because the faculty is well educated and there is really good infrastructure and fac

content.Placements: I don’t know the exact percentage of students who are placed, but nearly 50+% are placed. And for placement, you have to not only complete graduation but also take part in different workshops and activities which are helpful for our credit. I can’t answer the other questions, I don’t have an idea about that.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my college are well good. Labs are well cleaned and PCs work better. Classrooms are also nice, every classroom has a projector, whiteboards, and a blackboard. The library is also big for study, and there are many books in the library related to courses. I am not a hosteller, so I can’t answer that one. Sports and games are also given importance, and the food in the canteen is okay.

admission_process.title: Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College admission2025 is currently open for various courses. The college offers courses, such as BTech, BArch, MArch, etc., at the UG and PG level. The application process atJawaharlal Nehru Engineering Collegeis conducted online. JNEC is a constituent college of theMGM University. Read the following article to know more aboutJawaharlal Nehru Engineering College course admission2025.

Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College admission 2025is entrance-based. The university also accepts national-level entrance exams like GATE, JEE Main, NATA etc. for admission to specific courses like BTech, MTech, BArch, etc. The college offers over 20 courses including specialisations in various streams such as Engineering, Computer Application, Architecture, etc. Check out the following table for details aboutJawaharlal Nehru Engineering College course admissions2025:
Particulars
Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered
Download now
JNEC UG Admission Brochure
JNEC PG Admission Brochure

JNEC courses' admissions are based on entrance exam scores. The college also considers counselling rounds to prepare the final merit list for all courses. Students must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection criteria forJawaharlal Nehru Engineering College courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% for Backward class categories and Persons with Disability students belonging to Maharashtra State only)
MGMU-CET/MHT CET/PERA CET/JEE Main
Class 12 or its equivalent withPhysics, Chemistry andMathematicssubjects from a recognised board
Bachelor's Degree in CSE or BSc/ BCom/ BA with Mathematics as a subject in Class 12 or at Graduation level with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised board/college
MGM CET (MCA)/MAH-MCA-CET/PERA CET
Graduation in a relevant stream with a minimum aggregate of 50% from a recognised college
GATE/MGMU CET/PERA CET
Graduation with a mini from a recognised college
GATE/MGMU CET/PERA CET/MAH-M.ARCH-CET

JNEC admission processincludes several steps. The admission process is entirely online mode. Students need to meet the specified eligibility and clear the relevant entrance exam, to secure a seat at the college. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College:
JNEC application process

Interested students must register on the official website of JNEC and complete the application form duly, including the mentioned details, including name, number, and other credentials. The application fee for all the courses is INR 1,500. Students must also upload scanned images of valid, necessary original documents as per the admission requirement while completing the online application form.
Selection & Counselling Process

Selection will be done based on valid scores obtained by the students in the relevant entrance exams. The college accepts scores obtained in the MGM CET, along with other national and state-level tests such as JEE Mains, GATE, NATA and more. Final merit lists will be prepared and shortlisted students will be called for the admission round.
Admission Confirmation

The students shall report for admission to the institution according to the admission schedule. The candidate shall confirm admission by paying the requisite fee and submitting the required documents in original to the institute. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theJNEC feeto confirm their seats at the university.
Check out more on Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College Admission in the below video:

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for JNEC Aurangabad BTech course?
faqs.answer: The selection for JNEC Aurangabad BTech course is based on PERA CET, MHT CET, JEE Main and MGMU-CET score. Additionally, candidates must pass HSC or its equivalent examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry or Biotechnology or Biology or Technical Vocational subject or Computer Science or Information Technology or Informatics Practices or Agriculture or Engineering Graphics or Business Studies with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate, in case of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) in the above subjects taken together to apply for BTech course. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the college. The total seat intake for BTech course is 630. faqs.question: What is the MCA fee at JNEC Aurangabad?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MCA is INR 1.50 lakh. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MCA course will be based on national and state-level entrance exams like PERA CET, MGMU-CET (MCA) and MHT CET. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

Admission to BTech course will be based on national and state-level entrance exams like PERA CET, JEE Main, MGMU-CET and MHT CET. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. Aspirants will also need to pay a registration fee to apply for admission. Candidates can pay the registration fee via any of the online payment mode.

hostel_campus.college_name: JNEC Aurangabad Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Scanned Class 10, Class 12 and graduation marksheet

reviews.review_heading: College is good because the faculty is well educated and there is really good infrastructure and fac
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my college are well good. Labs are well cleaned and PCs work better. Classrooms are also nice, every classroom has a projector, whiteboards, and a blackboard. The library is also big for study, and there are many books in the library related to courses. I am not a hosteller, so I can’t answer that one. Sports and games are also given importance, and the food in the canteen is okay.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the MCA course.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities like a strong Wi-Fi connection and also an internet LAN is provided for a good network. Good computers are provided to practice and run the code easily. Good books are provided for exam preparation so students can understand easily.

reviews.review_heading: Not only on campus our seniors shined in off-campus placements by achieving high packages.
reviews.review_text: So the labs are full of good processing PCs and good internet connection through LAN and the classrooms and labs have their own projector. The library also has a wide variety of books related to courses and computer science and engineering subjects. I don't know about the hostel, but the canteen is good with proper management and cleanliness. Also, the college provides a free gym.

reviews.review_heading: Value of money to get admission in JNEC college for MCA.
reviews.review_text: The college canteen also provides good quality food, and the taste is very delicious! A sports ground is available for outdoor activities, and there is also a separate gym and swimming pool for physical fitness to keep us fit and healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Top college in Aurangabad to get well educated.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. The atmosphere is too good for educational purposes. We also have a computer lab with internet and lawns. The classrooms are too good and MGM's canteen food is also fresh and too good taste. There is its own cricket ground and also a swimming pool. There is a gym to brighten our sports skills.

reviews.review_heading: JNEC is good and its infrastructure, faculty members, and placements are good,
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with facilities available such as Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, labs, and computer labs. The hostel is very clean, and while the quality of food in the hostel is average, the overall infrastructure of the college is impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure but weak environment.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and well-maintained in every branch and department. As the fees are also high in private colleges, they have to manage the infrastructure. Toilets are also cleaned. There are parking and canteens but you have to pay for them separately and mess is also available.

reviews.review_heading: The best college and university in Chh. Sambhajinagar.
reviews.review_text: The department overall is very cooperative for students' well-being and education. Teachers and staff are helpful, providing students with all the required information. Labs, libraries, Wi-Fi, etc., are available all over the campus and specifically for the department's students. The overall hostel facilities are in excellent condition, with provisions for everything needed.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty’s good placement in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Invite department, the library is very excellent and in the library many books are available. Your department’s Wi-Fi is average, but the classroom and infrastructure are very good. And the faculty is very supportive. If you don't understand something in the books, the teacher will tell you with love.

reviews.review_heading: Get here only if you want a good infrastructure college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available at the college premises but not for personal use. The college campus and infrastructure are very good. There is a huge library where you can study, and it is open full-time during the end semester. The labs are good, but some desktops are not in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: MGM's Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for this is very nice. Many computer labs are available for students. All computers are updated. Wi-Fi speed is also high. In the classroom, teachers teach on the board, and projectors are also available. Hostel rules are very strict. Canteen food is very hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and placement. I love the campus and sports activities.
reviews.review_text: The college campus including hostels is clean and well-secured. Good medical and gym facilities are available and the staff emphasizes health by encouraging attendance in yoga classes and gym sessions. The canteen is neat and clean, surrounded by lush greenery creating a dreamy atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGM on Shiksha
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are available, though Wi-Fi is not provided for the course. The classrooms are well-maintained, and there is a digital library. The quality of food available in the mess is very good. Sports and games facilities are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of engineering at JNEC in 2023.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very beautiful. Labs are up-to-date. The network is also good. The Apple Lab is also there. Practical sessions are conducted regularly. Greenery is all over. The college lawn is very beautiful; it has seating arrangements and mountains. The food quality at the canteen is good. If you do not like campus canteens, you have the option of a sports canteen near campus. The food quality and menu are both very good. Hostels are available inside the campus and they are affordable. ...

reviews.review_heading: Inside JNEC: A student's perspective.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is great; saying it is one of the best in town would not be an overstatement. The college building is well maintained and in good shape. The classrooms are very spacious, clean and well ventilated. The computer labs in the college are maintained and up-to-date, the systems work properly and there is a table internet connection at all times. Computer labs also have air conditioning facilities. Other labs, like Chemistry lab and Physics lab are also up-to-date, w...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jawaharlal Nehru Engineering College, MGM University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies of our college are J&J, Greaves Cotton, TCS, Tech Mahindra, IFB, Videocon Industries and GKN Inter Metals.
The efforts taken by the faculty to place the students in these companies was unforgettable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements, experienced faculty members, decent infrastructure with value for money.

review_content.Placements: I belong to the 2024 passing-out batch (B.E IT). Around 75% of students in our course got placed. The highest package is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Average salary is around 3.8 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, Winjit, Persistent, etc. About 80% of students got internships in companies like Bosch, ABB, Roboyo, etc. Top roles offered are software developer, GET, analyst and web developer. Placement department is supportive and offers multiple opportunities for all branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are smartboard-enabled and labs are well-equipped with updated PCs and internet. Wi-Fi is average, but library is excellent with journals and e-resources. Hostel facilities are decent. Rooms are clean. Mess food is average but hygienic. Canteen is budget-friendly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: One of the best engineering colleges in Nashik.

content.Placements: As I am a first-year student, I don't know more about the placement, but as my seniors told me, the placement of this college is very good. All the teachers are very helpful for placement. The highest package that a final year IT student can get is 12 LPA, and the average package is about 4 LPA to 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is very good. Some of the buildings are newly constructed, and some have been renovated recently. There is a very big library in the main building. There is Wi-Fi access for all students in the college, and there are good condition labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in 2015. The college has best infrastructure.

content.Placements: Top of the line companies come to college for the selection of students for the best roles offered by companies like CEO, worker engineers, and many more. The average package of KBTCOE is 5 LPA, and the percentage of students who were placed in companies is around 8 plus CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a gym and a big playground for students, along with many more physical options for students, like a green gym, cricket ground, basketball court, bike parking, best labs, best classrooms, and many other facilities. This college has the best teachers and coworkers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, experienced faculty members, decent infrastructure with value for money.

content.Placements: I belong to the 2024 passing-out batch (B.E IT). Around 75% of students in our course got placed. The highest package is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. Average salary is around 3.8 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, Winjit, Persistent, etc. About 80% of students got internships in companies like Bosch, ABB, Roboyo, etc. Top roles offered are software developer, GET, analyst and web developer. Placement department is supportive and offers multiple opportunities for all branches.
content.Infrastructure: College has decent infrastructure. Classrooms are smartboard-enabled and labs are well-equipped with updated PCs and internet. Wi-Fi is average, but library is excellent with journals and e-resources. Hostel facilities are decent. Rooms are clean. Mess food is average but hygienic. Canteen is budget-friendly.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice. College provides various facilities. The library staff is good but the peon is too much arrogant and doesn't allow the students to sit in the library. Even if there is no lecture schedule for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements, supportive faculty, and decent infrastructure with scope for industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well equipped computer labs high speed WiFi smart classrooms and access to a central library with digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, while the mess and canteen provide average but hygienic food. Basic medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games are also available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is improving, and facilities are much better.
reviews.review_text: All courses are available. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are available for every department. The college facilities are better. The college has a canteen, gym, library, and sports equipment. Food and all the facilities in the hostels are satisfactory. The infrastructure of both is improving.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good choice for a career. Teachers are nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are excellent; each department is well-equipped with up-to-date labs. The library and classrooms have all the necessities, and classrooms are well-equipped with LCD projectors, and the library is well-stocked with more than 36,000 books.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is continuously improving. The education quality and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Top courses like information technology, computer science, electronics and telecommunications, civil, mechanical, instrumentation, and artificial intelligence are provided. B.Teach and M.Teach courses are both provided. The hostel for girls is next to the campus with good accommodation.

reviews.review_heading: A glimpse of NDMVPS's KBTCOE.
reviews.review_text: There are high-tech Heating, Ventilation, Air Conditioning, and Refrigeration labs, Fluid Mechanics lab, CAD/CAM and CAE lab, Design of Machinery lab, Turbomachinery lab, and a high-tech CNC lab also available for precision manufacturing, provided with an Engineering Metallurgy lab as well. There is a hostel facility for girls, the quality of food is good, and great infrastructure is provided for the hostel, with Wi-Fi availability in the rooms. A gym is also provided for mood refreshment, and a...

reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department are a library, Wi-Fi, and a water purifier. Our hostel provides good quality food. Our college has a gym and a ground. Facilities in our college are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KBT College of Engineering, Nashik.
reviews.review_text: KBT College of Engineering has an open library with a good internet connection. Students can only be accessed by a user ID provided to each student. college also has a very nice cafeteria. Our college organises number of sports events, which help in developing personal health.

faqs.answer:
A:    Chhatrapati Shahu College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed Diploma Course in Engineering and Technology in relevant stream with minimum 45% marks (40% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from an All India Council for Technical Education or Central or State Government approved Institution or its equivalent.
OR

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Good choice for engineering with supportive faculty, decent placements, and strong infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Around 70-75% of students in the artificial intelligence and data science branch get placed every year, with many opting for higher studies as well. The highest package offered in recent batches is around 10 LPA to 12 LPA, the lowest being around 3 LPA, and the average package falls between 4 LPA to 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and some product-based startups in AI/ML and data science domains. About 60% of students also receive internship opportunities in companies like Persistent Systems, Bosch, and startups working in AI/ML, web development, and data analytics.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College for an excellent future.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students get placements where around 7 to 10 LPA is the average package that students got. The college focuses on practical knowledge, the skill of the individual, and extracurricular activities, along with academics. They also provide an interesting platform for Tifan, BAJA national competition under SAE India, and advanced technology, such as done locopilot training, etc. A big campus of Chhatrapati Shahu College Maharaj Shikshan Sansthan (CSMSS) provides the best educational environment.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided in my college (e.g., Wi-Fi, practical labs, library, extracurricular labs of Tifan and BAJA). The college has a playground, a student training center, and a well-developed hostel with good food quality in the mess is available in the college.

review_summary.college_name: Chhatrapati Shahu College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Very good college. I will recommend this college to students.

content.Placements: Nearly 90 percent of students are placed every year, and the placement rate is good compared to other colleges of this league. The highest package offered is 15 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Many companies include TCS, Infosys, etc. 98 percent of students got internships, some in electronics and some in the IT sector.
content.Infrastructure: There is a huge library which has over thousands of books and a study point also. 24 hours Wi-Fi and good cleanliness in classrooms and library. There are 2 boys’ hostels and 3–4 girls’ hostels, where we have 24 hours Wi-Fi. There are 2 canteens which are affordable too.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strict in studies, but teaching quality is great.

content.Placements: 30-40 percent of students got placed, with the highest package being 15 LPA and the lowest 2.1 LPA. The average package is around 4 LPA in companies like Kinora Network. Around 40-50 percent of students got internships from my course in companies like Novius Technologies. Top roles offered are AI engineer, data analyst, software engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our department are great. There are multiple labs with connected Wi-Fi, around 18 classrooms, and a library inside the department. We also have a Mac lab in our department, which is the only one in the whole college. The hostel is pretty good, the quality of the canteen is average, medical facilities are good, and sports and games are average.

individual_reviews.title: Good choice for engineering with supportive faculty, decent placements, and strong infrastructure.

The highest package offered in recent batches is around 10 LPA to 12 LPA, the lowest being around 3 LPA, and the average package falls between 4 LPA to 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant, and some product-based startups in AI/ML and data science domains. About 60% of students also receive internship opportunities in companies like Persistent Systems, Bosch, and startups working in AI/ML, web development, and data analytics.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College for an excellent future.

content.Placements: Most of the students get placements where around 7 to 10 LPA is the average package that students got. The college focuses on practical knowledge, the skill of the individual, and extracurricular activities, along with academics. content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are provided in my college (e.g., Wi-Fi, practical labs, library, extracurricular labs of Tifan and BAJA). The college has a playground, a student training center, and a well-developed hostel with good food quality in the mess is available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: 2025 CSMSS College - Placements and many more.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies are Mahindra, TCS, etc. Top roles are design engineer, software engineer, etc. 60% of students got internships almost. The highest package is 16 LPA. The average package is 3.25 LPA. This year from mechanical branch the highest package is 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have a Wi-Fi connection with high speed. Labs are arranged properly and classrooms with projectors and digital boards for study. Library with AC and comfortable facilities for students with all the needed books for courses. Canteen food is healthy and hygiene is maintained. Medical facilities are nearby the college. Sports are nearby college with big ground for cricket, volleyball, kabaddi, table tennis, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CSMSS College Of Engineering .
reviews.review_text: In my course, the facilities are very good and the infrastructure available in our department is excellent. Our classrooms have smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, and in the library, there are high-quality computers. In my hostel, there are various facilities, a cot-based room, and a Wi-Fi connection. The hostel mess is available and also has a canteen, along with a sports and game zone.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the placements, and events do not take place regularly.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good; there are separate hostels for boys and girls, and sports facilities are also available. Mess food is not good; it lacks taste. Facilities are provided such as Wi-Fi, classrooms are neat and tidy, and medical support is also given. An ambulance is also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am a student of 2027 batch.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are good. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. The quality of food is nice. 4-sharing rooms are available. Food quality is decent, and food is provided 3 times a day. For lunch, we get unlimited chapati and 2 curries like dal or green vegetables. But the hostel lighting is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The Struggle story of 6 years
reviews.review_text: All facilities provided by college are excellent. Barely there are some issues. College has numerous labs, students do projects in. Like, the faculties are good but have some ego issues but overall it's a very good college in terms of facilitations and canteen facilities.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Chhatrapati Shahu College of Engineering

likes.text: Many companies like TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, IBM, etc., visit our college to hire students.
The training and placement cell of our college was excellent, and each year maximum students get placed in MNCs like TCS, Varroc, etc.
